```kt
    // set to a modified FadeThroughProvider or any other VisibilityAnimatorProvider.
    secondaryAnimatorProvider = null

    addTarget(R.id.main_container)
  }

  window.exitTransition = exit

  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
  setContentView(R.layout.activity_main)
  ...
}
```

##### Shared axis attributes

Element        | Attribute                | Related method(s)                 | Default value
-------------- | ------------------------ | --------------------------------- | -------------
**Duration** | `motionDurationLong1`           | `getDuration`<br/>`setDuration`          | `300ms`
**Easing** | `motionEasingStandard`           | `getInterpolator`<br/>`setInterpolator`          | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1)`<br/>`FastOutSlowIn`

See the [Motion Theming section](#theming) for details on how to systematically
update motion.

### Fade through

The **fade through** pattern is used for transitions between UI elements that do
not have a strong relationship to each other.

!["Fade through gallery - normal speed and slow motion"](assets/motion/fade_through_lineup.gif)
_Examples of the fade through pattern:_

1.  _Tapping destinations in a bottom navigation bar_
2.  _Tapping a refresh icon_
3.  _Tapping an account switcher_

#### Using the fade through pattern

`MaterialFadeThrough` is a `Visibility` transition. A `Visibility` transition is
triggered when the target `View`'s visibility is changed or when the `View` is
added or removed. This means `MaterialFadeThrough` requires a View to be
changing in visibility or to be added or removed to trigger its animation.

A fade through can be configured to transition between a number of Android
structures including Fragments, Activities and Views.

#### Fade through examples

##### Transition between Fragments

In Fragment A, configure an exit `MaterialFadeThrough` transition and in
Fragment B configure an enter `MaterialFadeThrough` transition. Both of these
will be used (and reused) when navigating from Fragment A to Fragment B and from
Fragment B to Fragment A.

```kt
// FragmentA.kt

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)

  exitTransition = MaterialFadeThrough()
}
```

```kt
// FragmentB.kt

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)

  enterTransition = MaterialFadeThrough()
}
```

**Note:** Since `MaterialFadeThrough` extends `Visibility`,
`MaterialFadeThrough` is able to appropriately animate targets depending on
whether they are appearing or disappearing.

When you're ready to navigate between Fragment A and Fragment B, use a standard
Fragment transaction or use the
[Navigation Component](https://developer.android.com/guide/navigation/navigation-getting-started).

```kt
supportFragmentManager
  .beginTransaction()
  .replace(R.id.fragment_container, FragmentB())
  .commit()
```

##### Transition between Activities

**Note:** Activity and Window transitions require using Android Framework
Transitions provided in the `com.google.android.material.transition.platform`
package.

Enable Activity transitions by either setting
`android:windowActivityTransitions` to true in your theme or enabling them on an
Activity-by-Activity basis by setting the `Window.FEATURE_ACTIVITY_TRANSITIONS`
flag.

```xml
<style name="MyTheme" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar">
  ...
  <item name="android:windowActivityTransitions">true</item>
</style>
```

Or in your Activities:

```kt
override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
  window.requestFeature(Window.FEATURE_ACTIVITY_TRANSITIONS)
  ...
}
```

To get started, configure a new `MaterialFadeThrough` in Activity A and set it
as the Activity's exitTransition.

```kt
// ActivityA.kt

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {

  val exit = MaterialFadeThrough().apply {

    // Only run the transition on the contents of this activity, excluding
    // system bars or app bars if provided by the appвҖҷs theme.
    addTarget(R.id.a_container)
  }
  window.exitTransition = exit

  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
  setContentView(R.layout.activity_a)
}
```

You can optionally add or exclude targets to have the transition affect or
ignore Views. Use the combination you need to have the transition applied where
youвҖҷd like. For example:

```kt
val exit = MaterialFadeThrough().apply {

  window.requestFeature(Window.FEATURE_ACTIVITY_TRANSITIONS)

  // Only run the transition on the root ViewGroup of this activity. This will exclude
  // other Views except what is specified by this method.
  addTarget(R.id.a_container)

  // OR

  // Run the transition on everything except the system status and navigation bars. All
  // other Views, besides those explicitly excluded, will be affected by the transition.
  excludeTarget(android.R.id.statusBarBackground, true)
  excludeTarget(android.R.id.navigationBarBackground, true)
}
```

Next, configure a new `MaterialFadeThrough` enter transition in Activity B.

```kt
// ActivityB.kt

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {

  window.requestFeature(Window.FEATURE_ACTIVITY_TRANSITIONS)

  val enter = MaterialFadeThrough().apply {
    addTarget(R.id.b_container)
  }
  window.enterTransition = enter

  // Allow Activity AвҖҷs exit transition to play at the same time as this ActivityвҖҷs
  // enter transition instead of playing them sequentially.
  window.allowEnterTransitionOverlap = true

  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
  setContentView(R.layout.activity_b)
  ...
}
```

When you're ready to navigate from Activity A to Activity B, start Activity B as
you normally would, passing in an `ActivityOptions` `Bundle`.

```kt
val bundle = ActivityOptions.makeSceneTransitionAnimation(this).toBundle()
startActivity(Intent(this, ActivityB::class.java), bundle)
```

##### Transition between Views

In your Activity or FragmentвҖҷs layout, identify the two Views which will be
вҖңswappedвҖқ. The outgoing View should be added to the layout and visible. The
incoming View should either be set to `View.GONE` or not yet added to the
layout. When youвҖҷre ready to replace the outgoing View with the incoming View,
do so with a fade through transition as follows.

```kt
val fadeThrough = MaterialFadeThrough()

// Begin watching for changes in the View hierarchy.
TransitionManager.beginDelayedTransition(container, fadeThrough)

// Make any changes to the hierarchy to be animated by the fade through transition.
outgoingView.visibility = View.GONE
incomingView.visibility = View.VISIBLE
```

This will transition between your outgoing and incoming Views with a fade
through transition. To reverse the animation, follow the same steps, setting
your outgoing View back to `View.VISIBLE` and your incoming View back to
`View.GONE`.

#### Customization

`MaterialFadeThrough` is an extension of `MaterialVisibility`.
`MaterialVisibility` is a `Visibility` transition composed of smaller, "atomic"
`VisibilityAnimatorProvider`s. These providers are classes which can be
configured and are able to construct an animator depending on whether a target
is appearing or disappearing. By default, a `MaterialVisibility` implementation
has a primary and secondary `VisibilityAnimatorProvider`. The primary provider
can be modified while the secondary provider can be either modified, replaced or
removed. This allows for the customization of Material motion while still
adhering to a pattern's foundation and is referred to as a *variant*.

##### Fade through composition

Element                 | Primary transition | Secondary transition
----------------------- | ------------------ | --------------------
**MaterialFadeThrough** | `FadeThrough`      | `Scale`

##### Fade through slide variant

The code below will create a fade through between Fragments which fades Fragment
A out (without a scale) and fades Fragment B in with a *slide* instead of a
scale.

```kt
// FragmentA.kt

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
  exitTransition = MaterialFadeThrough().apply {
    // Remove the exit fade through's secondary scale so this Fragment simply fades out.
    secondaryAnimatorProvider = null
  }
}
```

```kt
// FragmentA.kt

override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
  super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)

  enterTransition = MaterialFadeThrough().apply {
    // Replace the enter fade through's secondary animator provider with a SlideDistanceProvider.
    secondaryAnimatorProvider = SlideDistanceProvider(Gravity.BOTTOM)
  }
}
```

##### Fade through attributes

Element        | Attribute                | Related method(s)                 | Default value
-------------- | ------------------------ | --------------------------------- | -------------
**Duration** | `motionDurationLong1`           | `getDuration`<br/>`setDuration`          | `300ms`
**Easing** | `motionEasingStandard`           | `getInterpolator`<br/>`setInterpolator`          | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 0.2, 1)`<br/>`FastOutSlowIn`

See the [Motion Theming section](#theming) for details on how to systematically
update motion.

### Fade

The **fade** pattern is used for UI elements that enter or exit within the
bounds of the screen, such as a dialog that fades in the center of the screen.

!["Fade gallery - normal speed and slow motion"](assets/motion/fade_lineup.gif)
_Examples of the fade pattern:_

1.  _A dialog_
2.  _A menu_
3.  _A snackbar_
4.  _A FAB_

#### Using the fade pattern

`MaterialFade` is a `Visibility` transition. A `Visibility` transition is
triggered when the target `View`'s visibility is changed or when the `View` is
added or removed. This means `MaterialFade` requires a View to be changing in
visibility or to be added or removed to trigger its animation.

#### Fade examples

##### Transition a View

In your Activity or Fragment, toggle the visibility of your target View, in this
case a Floating Action Button, using a `MaterialFade` to animate the change.

```kt
// FragmentA.kt

showButton.setOnClickListener {
   val materialFade = MaterialFade().apply {
     duration = 150L
   }
   TransitionManager.beginDelayedTransition(container, materialFade)
   fab.visibility = View.VISIBLE
}
```

When reversing the transition, configure and trigger a `MaterialFade` in the
same manner, making any adjustments to the transition that differ, when entering
versus exiting.

```kt
// FragmentA.kt

hideButton.setOnClickListener {
   val materialFade = MaterialFade().apply {
     duration = 84L
   }
   TransitionManager.beginDelayedTransition(container, materialFade)
   fab.visibility = View.GONE
}
```

#### Customization

`MaterialFade` is an extension of `MaterialVisibility`. `MaterialVisibility` is
a `Visibility` transition composed of smaller, "atomic"
`VisibilityAnimatorProvider`s. These providers are classes which can be
configured and are able to construct an animator depending on whether a target
is appearing or disappearing. By default, a `MaterialVisibility` implementation
has a primary and secondary `VisibilityAnimatorProvider`. The primary provider
can be modified while the secondary provider can be either modified, replaced or
removed. This allows for the customization of Material motion while still
adhering to a pattern's foundation and is referred to as a *variant*.

##### Fade composition

Element          | Primary transition | Secondary transition
---------------- | ------------------ | --------------------
**MaterialFade** | `Fade`             | `Scale`

<!-- Todo: Add snippet of variant -->

##### Fade through attributes

Element        | Attribute                | Related method(s)                 | Default value
-------------- | ------------------------ | --------------------------------- | -------------
**Duration (incoming)** | `motionDurationShort2`           | `getDuration`<br/>`setDuration`          | `150ms`
**Duration (outgoing)** | `motionDurationShort1`           | `getDuration`<br/>`setDuration`          | `75ms`
**Easing** | `motionEasingLinear`           | `getInterpolator`<br/>`setInterpolator`          | `cubic-bezier(0 0, 1, 1)`<br/>`Linear`

See the [Motion Theming section](#theming) for details on how to systematically
update motion.



---
## File: docs/theming/Dark.md

<!--docs:
title: "Dark Theme"
layout: detail
section: theming
excerpt: "Dark Theme"
iconId: dark
path: /theming/dark/
-->

# Dark theme

The [Material dark theme system][dark-theme-mdc-spec] can be used to create a
beautiful and functional dark theme for your app. A dark theme generally
consists of dark background colors and light foreground colors for elements such
as text and iconography.

Benefits of a dark theme include: improved battery power conservation for
devices with OLED screens; reduced eye strain; and better visibility in
low-light environments.

Starting with [Android Q][dark-theme-dac-docs], users are now able to switch
their device to a dark theme via a new system setting, which applies to both the
Android system UI and apps running on the device.

## Design and API Documentation

-   [Material Design guidelines: Dark Theme][dark-theme-mdc-spec]
-   [Android Q Dark Theme Documentation][dark-theme-dac-docs]
-   [AppCompat DayNight Documentation][daynight-appcompat-docs]

## Setup

Before you can use the Material dark theme functionality, you need to add a
dependency to the Material Components for Android library. For more information,
go to the
[Getting started](https://github.com/material-components/material-components-android/tree/master/docs/getting-started.md)
page.

In order to support a dark theme for Android Q and above, make sure you are
depending on the latest version of the
[Material Android library][maven-repo-mdc], and update your app theme to inherit
from `Theme.Material3.DayNight` (or one of its descendants). For example:

**res/values/themes.xml**

```xml
<style name="Theme.MyApp" parent="Theme.Material3.DayNight">
    <!-- ... -->
</style>
```

Alternatively, if you want to define separate `Light` and `Dark` themes for your
app, you can inherit from `Theme.Material3.Light` in the `res/values` directory,
and `Theme.Material3.Dark` in the `res/values-night` directory:

**res/values/themes.xml**

```xml
<style name="Theme.MyApp" parent="Theme.Material3.Light">
    <!-- ... -->
</style>
```

**res/values-night/themes.xml**

```xml
<style name="Theme.MyApp" parent="Theme.Material3.Dark">
    <!-- ... -->
</style>
```

The `Theme.Material3.Dark` theme is a static dark theme, whereas
`Theme.Material3.DayNight` is a more dynamic theme which will help facilitate
easy switching between your app's `Light` and `Dark` theme. If using a
`DayNight` theme, you can define one app theme that references color resources,
which can be overridden in the `values-night` directory if needed.

## Catalog

To see how Material components adapt in a dark theme, build and run the
[Catalog app](../catalog-app.md) and enable a dark theme in one of the following
ways:

*   Any API Level: Settings gear menu icon on Catalog home and demo screens
*   Android Q: `Settings > Display > Dark Theme` (or Dark Theme tile in Notification Tray)
*   Android P: `Settings > System > Developer options > Night mode`

## Color palette

At the core of any dark theme is a color palette that uses dark background
colors and light foreground colors. The Material `Dark` themes make use of the
[Material Color System](Color.md), in order to provide default dark theme values
for neutral palette colors such as `android:colorBackground` and `colorSurface`.

The baseline Material `Dark` theme background and surface colors are dark grey
instead of black, which increases visibility for shadows and also reduces eye
strain for light text.

The Material `Dark` themes also provide adjusted defaults for the baseline
branded palette, including `colorPrimary`, `colorSecondary`, `colorTertiary`,
and more. See the [Material Dark Theme spec][dark-theme-mdc-spec-ui-application]
for guidance on how you can adjust your brand colors for a dark theme.

## Elevation overlays

**Note:** Surface with elevation overlays has been replaced in Material
components with the
[tonal surface color system](./Color.md#using-surface-colors).

In addition to the color palette adjustments mentioned above, communicating the
hierarchy of a UI via elevation requires some dark theme-specific
considerations.

Shadows are less effective in an app using a dark theme, because they will have
less contrast with the dark background colors and will appear to be less
visible. In order to compensate for this, Material surfaces become lighter and
more colorful at higher elevations, when they are closer to the implied light
source.

This is accomplished via elevation overlays, which are semi-transparent
(`colorPrimary`) overlays that are conceptually placed on top of the surface
color. The semi-transparent alpha percentage is calculated using an equation
based on elevation, which results in higher alpha percentages at higher
elevations, and therefore lighter surfaces.

**Note:** we avoid overdraw with the elevation overlays by calculating a
composite blend of the surface color with the overlay color and using that as
the surface's background, instead of drawing another layer on the canvas.

### Affected components

The following is a list of Material components that support elevation overlays,
because they use `colorSurface` for their background and can be elevated:

*   [Top App Bar](../components/TopAppBar.md)
*   [Bottom App Bar](../components/BottomAppBar.md)
*   [Bottom Navigation](../components/BottomNavigation.md)
*   [Navigation Rail](../components/NavigationRail.md)
*   [Navigation Drawer](../components/NavigationDrawer.md)
*   [Bottom Sheet](../components/BottomSheet.md)
*   [Dialog](../components/Dialog.md)
*   [Date Picker](../components/DatePicker.md)
*   [Time Picker](../components/TimePicker.md)
*   [Menu](../components/Menu.md)
*   [Tabs](../components/Tabs.md)
*   [Card](../components/Card.md)
*   [FAB](../components/FloatingActionButton.md)
*   [Button](../components/Button.md)
*   [Chip](../components/Chip.md)
*   [Switch](../components/Switch.md)

### Theme attributes

In order to facilitate some orchestration around the elevation overlays, we have
the following theme attributes:

Attribute Name              |Description                                                                          |Default Value
----------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------
`elevationOverlayEnabled`   |Whether the elevation overlay functionality is enabled.                              |`true` in `Light` and `Dark` themes
`elevationOverlayColor`     |The color used for the elevation overlays, applied at an alpha based on elevation.   |`colorPrimary`

**Note:** If inheriting from a `Theme.Material3.*` theme, you most likely do not
have to set these attributes yourself because the Material themes already set up
the defaults, above.

### Custom views and non-Material Components

If you would like to apply elevation overlays to your custom views or any
non-Material views that are elevated surfaces, you can use the
`MaterialShapeDrawable` or `ElevationOverlayProvider` APIs.

#### MaterialShapeDrawable

The key to supporting elevation overlays in a custom view is creating a
`MaterialShapeDrawable` with the overlay support enabled via
`MaterialShapeDrawable#createWithElevationOverlay`, and setting it as the
background of your view.

Next, override the `View#setElevation` method and forward the elevation passed
in to your `MaterialShapeDrawable` background's `setElevation` method.

`MaterialShapeDrawable` is the preferred approach for custom views because it
will keep track of the elevation value for you, and factor that into the overlay
any time elevation changes. You don't have to worry about incorrectly
compounding the overlays multiple times.

#### ElevationOverlayProvider

If you have a case where the elevation value is more static and you would like
to get the corresponding elevation overlay color (perhaps to color an existing
view), then you can use `ElevationOverlayProvider`.

If elevation overlays are enabled at the theme level, the
`ElevationOverlayProvider#compositeOverlayWithThemeSurfaceColorIfNeeded` method
will return `colorSurface` with the overlay color blended in at an alpha level
based on the elevation passed in. Otherwise, it will simply return
`colorSurface`, so that you can use the result of this method without needing
any additional orchestration logic.

If you need to blend the overlays with an arbitrary color or an adjusted surface
color, or you need to get access to lower level values such as the overlay alpha
percentages, take a look at the other `ElevationOverlayProvider` methods
including `compositeOverlayIfNeeded`, `compositeOverlay`, and
`calculateOverlayAlpha`.

#### Absolute Elevation

When calculating the elevation overlay alpha percentage, Material components
factor in the absolute elevation of their parent view. This is because the
distance from the light source is the driving factor behind elevation overlays.

If you need to factor in absolute elevation in a custom view that supports
overlays, you can use the `MaterialShapeUtils#setParentAbsoluteElevation`
methods when using a `MaterialShapeDrawable` background. For example:

```java
@Override
protected void onAttachedToWindow() {
  super.onAttachedToWindow();

  MaterialShapeUtils.setParentAbsoluteElevation(this);
}
```

Alternatively, you could use the `ElevationOverlayProvider` composite methods
that take in a `View` parameter or the `getParentAbsoluteElevation` method.

**Note:** This means that you should consider accessibility contrast ratios for
text and iconography, when deeply nesting elevated Material components and views
that support elevation overlays.

[dark-theme-mdc-spec]: https://material.io/design/color/dark-theme.html
[dark-theme-mdc-spec-ui-application]: https://material.io/design/color/dark-theme.html#ui-application
[dark-theme-mdc-spec-custom-application]: https://material.io/design/color/dark-theme.html#custom-application
[dark-theme-dac-docs]: https://developer.android.com/preview/features/darktheme
[daynight-appcompat-docs]: https://medium.com/androiddevelopers/appcompat-v23-2-daynight-d10f90c83e94
[maven-repo-mdc]: https://maven.google.com/web/index.html#com.google.android.material:material


---
## File: docs/analysis_colors_typography.md

# ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming

## ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ·

ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming ШӘЩӮЩҶЩҠШ© Jetpack Compose Щ…Ш№ Щ…ЩғШӘШЁШ© Material 3 Expressive Щ„ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ… ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…. ЩҠШӘЩ…ЩҠШІ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§Щ… ШЁЩ…ШұЩҲЩҶШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ·ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШҜШ№Щ… ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ (Dark Mode) ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© (Dynamic Colors) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠintroduced ЩҒЩҠ Android 12. ЩҠЩҮШҜЩҒ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҶШҜ ШҘЩ„Щү ШӘЩӮШҜЩҠЩ… ШҙШұШӯ Щ…ЩҒШөЩ„ ЩҲШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ ШӯЩҲЩ„ ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҲШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ЩҒЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ.

ЩҠШ№ШҜ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Material 3 Expressive ЩҶШёШ§Щ…Ш§ЩӢ ЩҮШұЩ…ЩҠШ§ЩӢ ЩҲЩ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ШӘШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© (Primary) ШӘЩ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ЩҲЩ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ© (Secondary) Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҸЩғЩ…ЩҗЩ‘Щ„Ш©ШҢ ЩҲЩ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ© (Tertiary) Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩҲШ№ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ№ШЁЩҠШұ. ЩғЩ„ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ ШӘШӯШӘЩҲЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш№ШҜШ© ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШӘЩ…Ш«Щ„ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ (Primary) ЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ (Primary Container) ЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ (On Primary) ЩҲШәЩҠШұЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШӯ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө ЩҲШӘШЁШ§ЩҠЩҶЩҮ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ©.

---

## Ш§Щ„ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„: ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ (Colors System)

### 1.1 ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Color.kt

ЩҠЩӮШ№ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠ: `app/src/main/java/com/cuscus/wifiaudiostreaming/ui/theme/Color.kt`. ЩҠШӯШӘЩҲЩҠ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ ШіШӘШ© ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ…ЩӮШіЩ…Ш© ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№ШӘЩҠЩҶ: Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«Ш© ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ (Light Mode) ЩҲШ«Щ„Ш§Ш«Ш© ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ (Dark Mode). ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…ЩҸШіШӘЩ…ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ Щ„ЩҲШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ PURPLE ЩҒЩҠ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Material DesignШҢ ЩҲШӘЩ…Ш«Щ„ ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© Ш§ЩҶШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮ Ш¬ЩҠШҜШ© Щ„Щ„ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ… Щ„ШЈЩҶЩҮШ§ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘЩҲШ§ШІЩҶШ§ЩӢ ШЁШөШұЩҠШ§ЩӢ Щ…Щ…ШӘШ§ШІШ§ЩӢ ЩҲШӘШӘЩҶШ§ШіШЁ Щ…Ш№ Щ…Ш№ШёЩ… ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ….

#### Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ (Dark Theme Colors):

ШӘШӘЩғЩҲЩҶ Щ„ЩҲШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш« Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҠШ© ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘШЁШ§ЩҠЩҶШ§ЩӢ Щ…Щ…ШӘШ§ШІШ§ЩӢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„Щү ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ (Purple80) ШЁЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© Hexadecimal ШӘШіШ§ЩҲЩҠ `0xFFD0BCFF`ШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҲ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ ЩҶШіШЁЩҠШ§ЩӢ ЩҠЩҶШ§ШіШЁ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұЩ…Ш§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ (PurpleGrey80) ШЁЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© `0xFFCCC2DC`ШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҲ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШӘШҜЩ„ ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш© ЩҮЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШұШҜЩҠ (Pink80) ШЁЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© `0xFFEFB8C8`ШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҲ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШҜШ§ЩҒШҰ ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© Щ„Щ…ШіШ© Ш¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІ.

```kotlin
// Color.kt - ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
val Purple80 = Color(0xFFD0BCFF)    // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
val PurpleGrey80 = Color(0xFFCCC2DC)  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұЩ…Ш§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
val Pink80 = Color(0xFFEFB8C8)       // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШұШҜЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
```

#### Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ (Light Theme Colors):

ШӘЩ…Ш«Щ„ Щ„ЩҲШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШіШ® Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШӘШҙШЁШ№Ш§ЩӢ ЩҲШҜШ§ЩғЩҶШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШЎШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШЁШ§ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҠШҜ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ (Purple40) Щ„ЩҮ ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© `0xFF6650a4`ШҢ ЩҲЩҮЩҲ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ· Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶШ© ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘШЁШ§ЩҠЩҶШ§ЩӢ Ш¬ЩҠШҜШ§ЩӢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұЩ…Ш§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ (PurpleGrey40) ШЁЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© `0xFF625b71` ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШұШҜЩҠ (Pink40) ШЁЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© `0xFF7D5260` ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІШ§ЩӢ ШЁШөШұЩҠШ§ЩӢ.

```kotlin
// Color.kt - ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
val Purple40 = Color(0xFF6650a4)    // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
val PurpleGrey40 = Color(0xFF625b71)  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұЩ…Ш§ШҜЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
val Pink40 = Color(0xFF7D5260)       // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШұШҜЩҠ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
```

### 1.2 ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ (Color Scheme Implementation)

ЩҠЩҸШ№ШұЩҺЩ‘ЩҒ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Theme.ktlocated at `app/src/main/java/com/cuscus/wifiaudiostreaming/ui/theme/Theme.kt`. ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҒ ШҜШ§Щ„ШӘЩҠ `darkColorScheme()` ЩҲ `lightColorScheme()` Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩғШӘШЁШ© Material 3 Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш·Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©. ШӘШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш·Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«Ш© (Primary ЩҲ Secondary ЩҲ Tertiary) ШЁШ§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© (State Colors) Щ…Ш«Щ„ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ (Container Colors) ЩҲШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© (On Colors).

#### Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ:

```kotlin
private val DarkColorScheme = darkColorScheme(
    primary = Purple80,        // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
    secondary = PurpleGrey80,  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶsecondary ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
    tertiary = Pink80          // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Tertiary ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
)
```

#### Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ:

```kotlin
private val LightColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Purple40,        // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
    secondary = PurpleGrey40,  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Secondary ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
    tertiary = Pink40          // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Tertiary ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
    
    // Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШ©: ШӘЩҲШ¬ШҜ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠШ© ШЈШ®ШұЩү ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҲШІЩҮШ§ Щ…Ш«Щ„:
    // background, surface, onPrimary, onSecondary, onTertiary
    // onBackground, onSurface, ЩҲШәЩҠШұЩҮШ§
)
```

### 1.3 ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© (Dynamic Colors Support)

Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming ЩҮЩҲ ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© (Dynamic Colors) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠIntroduced ЩҒЩҠ Android 12 (Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү 31 Щ…ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© ШЁШұЩ…Ш¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘ). ШӘШӘЩҠШӯ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ© Щ„Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ ШӘЩ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩҠШ§ЩӢ Ш§Ш№ШӘЩ…Ш§ШҜ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶЩҮ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ„ЩҲШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҶШёШ§Щ… ШЈЩҲ Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҙШ©ШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩӢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ. ЩҠШӘЩ… ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ© Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠШ§ЩӢ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ЩҲЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ `dynamicColor` ЩҒЩҠ ШҜШ§Щ„Ш©зҡ„дё»йўҳ (Theme).

#### ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©:

ШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© ЩҒЩӮШ· Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ¬ЩҮШІШ© Android 12 ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШҜШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШҜШ«. Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ЩҸЩҒШ№ЩҺЩ‘Щ„Ш§ЩӢШҢ ЩҠЩӮЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ Щ…ЩҶ ШҘШөШҜШ§Шұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШҙШәЩҠЩ„ ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ЩӢШҢ Ш«Щ… ЩҠШ®ШӘШ§Шұ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ. ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ ЩҠШ№Щ…Щ„ ШЁШҘШөШҜШ§Шұ Android 12 ШЈЩҲ ШЈШӯШҜШ«ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… `dynamicDarkColorScheme()` ШЈЩҲ `dynamicLightColorScheme()` Щ„Щ„ШӯШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§Щ…. ШЈЩ…Ш§ ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ ШЁШҘШөШҜШ§Шұ ШЈЩӮШҜЩ… ШЈЩҲ ШӘЩ… ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ©ШҢ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш·Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ© ЩҠШҜЩҲЩҠШ§ЩӢ.

```kotlin
@Composable
fun WiFiAudioStreamingTheme(
    darkTheme: Boolean = isSystemInDarkTheme(),  // ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ ШӘЩ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩҠШ§ЩӢ
    dynamicColor: Boolean = true,                 // ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠШ§ЩӢ
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    // ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ
    val colorScheme = when {
        // ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҸЩҒШ№ЩҺЩ‘Щ„Ш© дё” Ш¬ЩҮШ§ШІ Android 12+
        dynamicColor && Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S -> {
            val context = LocalContext.current
            // Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
            if (darkTheme) dynamicDarkColorScheme(context) 
            else dynamicLightColorScheme(context)
        }
        
        // Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШөШө Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ
        darkTheme -> DarkColorScheme
        
        // Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШөШө Щ„Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ
        else -> LightColorScheme
    }

    // ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш№Щ„Щү MaterialTheme
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography,
        content = content
    )
}
```

### 1.4 ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© (State Colors) ЩҲШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…Ш§ШӘЩҮШ§

ЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Material 3 Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш© Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ШіЩҠШ§ЩӮ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„. ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio StreamingШҢ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩҲШ§ШіШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ© ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…. ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ: ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ (Container Colors) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҸШӯШҜШҜ Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҲШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© (On Colors) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШЎШ©ШҢ ЩҲШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ© (Interactive State Colors) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ© ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„.

#### ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ (Container Colors):

ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШұЩү. Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© (Primary Container) ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ·Ш© ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ© (Secondary Container) ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩӮЩ„ ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ©. Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ© (Tertiary Container) ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…ЩҠШІШ©. ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮЩҶШ§ШҢ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁЩғШ«ШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩғШұЩҲШӘ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveStreamingControlCenter - Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ
val cardColor by animateColorAsState(
    targetValue = if (isStreaming)
        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer  // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
    else 
        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh,  // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШіШ·Шӯ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© otherwise
    animationSpec = spring(
        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
    ),
    label = "Control Center Card Color"
)
```

#### ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ (Surface Colors):

ЩҠЩҸЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Material 3 ШӘШіШ№ Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ Ш№Щ…ЩӮ ЩҲШӘШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҮШұЩ…ЩҠ ШЁШөШұЩҠ. ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ШӘЩғШұШұ: Surface (Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ) Щ„Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©ШҢ Surface Container Low (ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШіШ·ШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶШ®ЩҒШ¶Ш©) Щ„Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҒШҢ Surface Container (ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШіШ·ШӯЩҠШ©) Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·ШҢ Surface Container High (ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШіШ·ШӯЩҠШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ©) Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§ШұШІШ©ШҢ ЩҲ Surface Container Highest (ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШіШ·ШӯЩҠШ© ЩӮШөЩҲЩү) Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ШЁШұЩҲШІШ§ЩӢ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveAudioSourceSelector - Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ
colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
    containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveDeviceDiscoveryPanel
colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
    containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh
)
```

#### ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© (State Colors):

ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ© ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШӯЩҲЩ„ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШөШұ. ШӘШҙЩ…Щ„ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ: Error ЩҲ Error Container Щ„Щ„ШЈШ®Ш·Ш§ШЎШҢ Warning Щ„Щ„ШӘШӯШ°ЩҠШұШ§ШӘШҢ Success Щ„Щ„ЩҶШ¬Ш§Шӯ (Ш№ШЁШұ tertiary)ШҢ ЩҲ On Surface Variant Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ©. ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩғШ«ЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ ШҙШұЩҠШ· Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩҠ (Top App Bar) Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveTopAppBar - Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
val containerColor by animateColorAsState(
    targetValue = when {
        isStreaming -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer      // ШЁШ« ЩҶШҙШ·
        connectionState.isConnected -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer  // Щ…ШӘШөЩ„
        connectionState.isError -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)  // Ш®Ш·ШЈ
        else -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface                      // default
    },
    animationSpec = spring(
        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
    ),
    label = "TopAppBar Container Color"
)

val indicatorColor by animateColorAsState(
    targetValue = when {
        isStreaming -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
        connectionState.isConnected -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiary
        connectionState.isError -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
        connectionState.isWaiting -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        else -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline
    },
    label = "Indicator Color"
)
```

### 1.5 Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҠШ© (Gradients)

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҠШ© (Gradients) ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© Ш¬Ш°Ш§ШЁШ© ЩҲШ№Щ…ЩӮ Щ„Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ. ЩҠШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ЩҠШ© (Radial Gradients) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш®Щ„ЩҒ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ·Ш© Щ„ШҘШ№Ш·Ш§ШЎ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҮШ¬ (Glow Effect). ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҒШҰШ© `Brush` Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩғШӘШЁШ© Compose.graphics Щ…Ш№ ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© `radialGradient()` Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ.

#### Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ЩҠ (Radial Gradient):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҲШ№ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Ш®Щ„ЩҒ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ· Щ„ШҘШ№Ш·Ш§ШЎ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҮШ¬. ЩҠШӘЩ… ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬ ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩҲ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ ЩҠШӘЩ… Щ…ШІШ¬ЩҮЩ…Ш§ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШөШұ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШұШ¬. ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ЩҶШіШ®Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ (Primary) Щ…Ш№ ЩӮЩҠЩ… ШҙЩҒШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© (Alpha) Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩӮ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ ШӘЩҲЩҮШ¬ ЩҶШ§Ш№Щ….

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveStreamingActiveIndicator - ШӘШҜШұШ¬ ШҙШ№Ш§Ш№ЩҠ Щ„Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҮШ¬ЩҠ
Box(
    modifier = Modifier
        .size(72.dp)
        .clip(CircleShape)
        .background(
            Brush.radialGradient(
                colors = listOf(
                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.1f),
                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.1f)
                )
            )
        )
        .scale(wavyScale)
        .graphicsLayer { alpha = pulse },
    contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
) {
    Icon(
        imageVector = Icons.Default.RadioButtonChecked,
        contentDescription = null,
        modifier = Modifier.size(36.dp),
        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
    )
}
```

### 1.6 ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ

#### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 1: ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ (Settings Cards)

ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩғШ«ЩҒ ЩҒЩҠ ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ. ЩҠШӘЩ… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ElevatedCard Щ…Ш№ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ© Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ Ш№Щ…ЩӮ ШЁШөШұЩҠ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ SettingsGroupCard
ElevatedCard(
    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(24.dp),
    elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(defaultElevation = 4.dp),
    colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainer
    )
) {
    // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ©
}
```

#### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 2: Щ…ЩҒШ§ШӘЩҠШӯ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ (Switches) ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ

ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ…ЩҒШ§ШӘЩҠШӯ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ primary ЩҲ secondary Щ„Щ„ШҘШҙШ§ШұШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ШҢ Щ…Ш№ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© Ш№Щ…ЩӮ ШЁШөШұЩҠ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveStreamingModeToggle
Row(
    modifier = Modifier
        .fillMaxWidth()
        .clip(shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp))
        .background(
            if (checked) 
                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.3f)
            else 
                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.3f)
        )
        .padding(16.dp)
        .scale(rowScale),
    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
) {
    Icon(
        imageVector = if (isChecked) checkedIcon else icon,
        contentDescription = null,
        modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp),
        tint = if (isChecked) 
            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary 
        else 
            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
    )
}
```

#### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 3: ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… (Control Buttons)

ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„ШҢ Щ…Щ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ШӘШәШ°ЩҠШ© ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Ш¶ШӯШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ….

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveServerControls
Button(
    onClick = {
        onStartServer()
        haptic.performHapticFeedback(HapticFeedbackType.LongPress)
    },
    enabled = isReady,
    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
        contentColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
        disabledContainerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainer,
        disabledContentColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.38f)
    ),
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp)
) {
    // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШІШұ
}
```

---

## Ш§Щ„ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ: ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· (Typography System)

### 2.1 Щ…ЩӮШҜЩ…Ш© ШҘЩ„Щү ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Typography ЩҒЩҠ Material 3

ЩҠЩҸШ№ШұЩҺЩ‘ЩҒ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· (Typography) ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Type.ktlocated at `app/src/main/java/com/cuscus/wifiaudiostreaming/ui/theme/Type.kt`. ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҒ ЩҒШҰШ© `Typography` Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩғШӘШЁШ© Material 3 Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ. ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ Material 3 ШӘШіШ№ ЩҒШҰШ§ШӘ ЩҶШөЩҠШ© ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ШӘШәШ·ЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…: Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ© (Headlines) Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·Ш© (Titles) Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© (Body) Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩүШҢ ЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ (Labels) Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШөШәЩҠШұШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©.

ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠ (FontFamily.Default) Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩҠШ№ШӘЩ…ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш®Ш· Roboto Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈШ¬ЩҮШІШ© Android. ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш· Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© ЩҲШ§ШіШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІШ§ЩҶ (Font Weights) Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШұШ§ЩҲШӯ Щ…ЩҶ Light (Ш®ЩҒЩҠЩҒ) ШҘЩ„Щү Bold (ШәШ§Щ…ЩӮ)ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ЩӮЩҠЩ… ЩҲШіЩҠШ·Ш© Щ…Ш«Щ„ Normal (Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ) ЩҲ Medium (Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·) ЩҲ SemiBold (ШҙШЁЩҮ ШәШ§Щ…ЩӮ). ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШІШ§ЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§ШҰЩҠ Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШіЩ„ШіЩ„ ЩҮШұЩ…ЩҠ ШЁШөШұЩҠ ЩҲШ§Ш¶Шӯ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ©.

### 2.2 ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©

ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҘШөШҜШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„ЩҠ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ШӘЩ… ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ ЩҶЩ…Ш· ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ ЩҒЩӮШ· ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ ЩҲЩҮЩҲ `bodyLarge`ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ШӘЩҲШ¬ШҜ ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ШЈШ®ШұЩү Щ…ЩҸШ№Щ„ЩҺЩ‘ЩӮШ© (commented out) ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ЩҮШ§ ШӯШіШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Ш¬Ш©. ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ¬ ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© Ш§ЩҶШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮ Щ…ШұЩҶШ© ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ЩҮШ§ ШӯШіШЁ Щ…ШӘШ·Щ„ШЁШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ….

#### ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Typography:

```kotlin
val Typography = Typography(
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,    // Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш®Ш· Roboto Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠ
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,      // ЩҲШІЩҶ Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠ
        fontSize = 16.sp,                     // ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш· 16 ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш©
        lineHeight = 24.sp,                   // Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шұ 24 ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш©
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp               // ШӘШЁШ§Ш№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұЩҲЩҒ 0.5 ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш©
    )
    /* Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШұЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҸШ№Щ„ЩҺЩ‘ЩӮШ©:
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        lineHeight = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        lineHeight = 16.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
    */
)
```

### 2.3 ШЈЩҲШІШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· (Font Weights) ЩҲШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮШ§

ЩҠЩҸЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Compose Ш®Щ…ШіШ© ШЈЩҲШІШ§ЩҶ ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ШӘЩғШұШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ. ЩҠЩҸШӯШҜШҜ ЩғЩ„ ЩҲШІЩҶ Щ…ШҜЩү ШіЩҸЩ…Щғ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш· ЩҲЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩҶШ§ШіШЁ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮ..weight.Bold (Ш§Щ„ЩҲШІЩҶ 700): ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ШЁШұЩҲШІШ§ЩӢ ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ§ЩӢ. weight.SemiBold (Ш§Щ„ЩҲШІЩҶ 600): ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш©. weight.Medium (Ш§Щ„ЩҲШІЩҶ 500): ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©. weight.Normal (Ш§Щ„ЩҲШІЩҶ 400): ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…. weight.Light (Ш§Щ„ЩҲШІЩҶ 300): ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ©.

```kotlin
// Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… weights Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ:
// Bold - Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.mode_selector_title),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// SemiBold - Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш©
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
)

// Medium - Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„
Text(
    text = if (isMulticast) stringResource(R.string.mode_multicast) 
           else stringResource(R.string.mode_unicast),
    color = contentColor,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
)

// Normal - Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…
Text(
    text = description,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
)

// Light - Щ„Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ©
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.buffer_size_value, sliderValue.toInt()),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Light
)
```

### 2.4 ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ

ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming ШіШЁШ№Ш© ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Material 3 Typography. Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШұШәЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ Щ…Ш№ШёЩ… ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ШәЩҠШұ Щ…ЩҸШ№ШұЩҺЩ‘ЩҒШ© ШөШұШ§ШӯШ©ЩӢ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Type.ktШҢ ШҘЩ„Ш§ ШЈЩҶ Material 3 ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш§ЩӢ Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠШ© Щ„ЩғЩ„ ЩҶЩ…Ш· ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…ЩҮШ§ Щ…ШЁШ§ШҙШұШ©. ЩҒЩҠЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ ШҙШұШӯ Щ…ЩҒШөЩ„ Щ„ЩғЩ„ ЩҶЩ…Ш· Щ…Ш№ ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ:

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· headlineLarge (Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҙШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ШөЩҒШӯШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҲШҙШ§ШҙШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШұШӯЩҠШЁ. ЩҠШӘЩ…ЩҠШІ ШЁШӯШ¬Щ… ЩғШЁЩҠШұ (32sp Ш№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ) ЩҲЩҲШІЩҶ Bold Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© Щ…ШӯЩҲШұЩҠШ© ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ©.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ WelcomePage
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.onboarding_welcome_title),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    textAlign = TextAlign.Center
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ FeaturesPage
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.onboarding_features_title),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    textAlign = TextAlign.Center
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· headlineMedium (Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ШЁШұЩҲШІШ§ЩӢ ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ headlineLarge. ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш№Ш§ШҜШ©ЩӢ ЩҒЩҠ ШҙШұЩҠШ· Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩҠ (Top App Bar) Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveTopAppBar
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    modifier = Modifier.scale(titleScale)
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· headlineSmall (Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШөШәЩҠШұ):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶШ§ЩӢ ШЈШөШәШұ Щ…ЩҶ headlineMediumШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩӮШіШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveStreamingActiveIndicator
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.streaming_active),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveServerControls
Text(
    text = if (isReady) stringResource(R.string.ready_to_stream) 
           else stringResource(R.string.select_source_text),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    textAlign = TextAlign.Center
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveClientIdleIndicator
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.waiting_for_server),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· titleLarge (Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩғШұЩҲШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ШЈЩӮШіШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveClientSettingsPanel
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.client_options_title),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveDeviceDiscoveryPanel
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.nearby_devices_title),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ SettingsGroupCard
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveAudioSourceSelector
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.source_selector_title),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· titleMedium (Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөШәШұ ШӯШ¬Щ…Ш§ЩӢШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveModeButton
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveAudioSourceToggle
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    fontWeight = if (checked) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Medium
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveStreamingModeToggle
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveDeviceCard
Text(
    text = hostname,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· titleSmall (Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШөШәЩҠШұ):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШөШәЩҠШұШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ - Ш№ЩҶШҜ ШӘЩҲЩҒШұЩҮ
// Text(
//     text = "Audio Settings",
//     style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
//     fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
// )
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· bodyLarge (ЩҶШө ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ЩӮШұШ§ШЎШ© Щ…ШұЩҠШӯШ©ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ ШЈЩҲШөШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveTopAppBar - subtitle
AnimatedContent(
    targetState = subtitle,
    transitionSpec = { /* transition spec */ },
    label = "Subtitle Animation"
) { status ->
    Text(
        text = status,
        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
        fontWeight = if (isStreaming) FontWeight.Medium else FontWeight.Normal,
        modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 2.dp)
    )
}

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ SettingsSwitchItem
Text(
    text = title,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveServerControls
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.server_ip_format, localIp),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp)
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· bodyMedium (ЩҶШө ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¬Щ…ШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ¶ЩҠШӯЩҠШ©.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveServerControls
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.server_ready_text),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
    textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp)
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveClientIdleIndicator
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.find_device_text),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.8f),
    textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp)
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveDeviceCard
Text(
    text = ipAddress,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· bodySmall (ЩҶШө ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ ШөШәЩҠШұ):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШөШәЩҠШұШ© Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШөШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШөЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ¶ЩҠШӯЩҠШ©ШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ Щ…ШіШ§ШӯШ© Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШЎШ©.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ SettingsSwitchItem
Text(
    text = description,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveModeButton
Text(
    text = subtitle,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
    textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp)
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveAudioSourceToggle
Text(
    text = subtitle,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveStreamingModeToggle
AnimatedContent(
    targetState = subtitle,
    transitionSpec = { /* transition spec */ },
    label = "Streaming Mode Subtitle"
) { text ->
    Text(
        text = text,
        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
    )
}
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· labelLarge (ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„Ш§ШӘШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ШӯШ¬Щ…Ш§ЩӢ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·Ш§ЩӢ ЩҲШ§Ш¶ШӯШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveServerControls
Text(
    text = if (isReady) stringResource(R.string.start_server_button) 
           else stringResource(R.string.select_source_text),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
)

// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ExpressiveSearchingIndicator
Text(
    text = stringResource(R.string.searching_indicator_text),
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
)
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· labelSmall (ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ© ШөШәЩҠШұШ©):

ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШЈШөШәШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© (Tags) ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„ЩҲЩ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ©.

```kotlin
// Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ ModeTag
Text(
    text = if (isMulticast) stringResource(R.string.mode_multicast) 
           else stringResource(R.string.mode_unicast),
    color = contentColor,
    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
    fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
)
```

---

## Ш§Щ„ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§Щ„Ш«: ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ

### 3.1 ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ

ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ MaterialTheme.colorScheme ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Щ…ЩҲШӯШҜШ© Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ. ЩҠЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§ШҰЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩҠ Щ…ЩғШ§ЩҶ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ MaterialTheme Щ„Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ©. ЩҒЩҠЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШұЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© Щ„Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ:

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШЁШ§ШҙШұ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ©:

```kotlin
// ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© @Composable
Column(
    modifier = Modifier.background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background)
) {
    Icon(
        imageVector = Icons.Default.Settings,
        contentDescription = null,
        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ
    )
    
    Text(
        text = "Secondary text",
        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Secondary
    )
    
    Text(
        text = "Tertiary accent",
        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiary  // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Tertiary
    )
}
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ:

```kotlin
// Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩ…ЩҠЩҠШІ
Card(
    colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer  // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ©
    )
) {
    Text(
        text = "Content",
        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer  // ЩҶШө Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ©
    )
}
```

#### Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө:

```kotlin
// Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ
Surface(
    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface,
    contentColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
) {
    Column {
        Text(
            text = "Primary text",
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
        )
        Text(
            text = "Secondary text",
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )
    }
}
```

### 3.2 ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө Color Scheme

Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Theme.kt ШЈЩҲ ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ. ЩҒЩҠЩ…Ш§ ЩҠЩ„ЩҠ Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш·:

#### ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ:

```kotlin
private val CustomLightColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    primary = Purple40,
    onPrimary = Color.White,
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFFE8DEF8),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF21005E),
    
    secondary = PurpleGrey40,
    onSecondary = Color.White,
    secondaryContainer = Color(0xFFE8DEF8),
    onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFF1D192B),
    
    tertiary = Pink40,
    onTertiary = Color.White,
    tertiaryContainer = Color(0xFFFFD8E4),
    onTertiaryContainer = Color(0xFF31111D),
    
    // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ
    background = Color(0xFFFFFBFE),
    onBackground = Color(0xFF1C1B1F),
    surface = Color(0xFFFFFBFE),
    onSurface = Color(0xFF1C1B1F),
    
    // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш©
    surfaceContainerLow = Color(0xFFF7F2FA),
    surfaceContainer = Color(0xFFF3EDF7),
    surfaceContainerHigh = Color(0xFFECE6F0),
    surfaceContainerHighest = Color(0xFFE6E0E9),
    
    // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ШЈ
    error = Color(0xFFB3261E),
    onError = Color.White,
    errorContainer = Color(0xFFF9DEDC),
    onErrorContainer = Color(0xFF410E0B),
    
    // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШҜЩҲШҜ
    outline = Color(0xFF79747E),
    outlineVariant = Color(0xFFCAC4D0)
)

private val CustomDarkColorScheme = darkColorScheme(
    primary = Purple80,
    onPrimary = Color(0xFF381E72),
    primaryContainer = Color(0xFF4F378B),
    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFEADDFF),
    
    secondary = PurpleGrey80,
    onSecondary = Color(0xFF332D41),
    secondaryContainer = Color(0xFF4A4458),
    onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFFE8DEF8),
    
    tertiary = Pink80,
    onTertiary = Color(0xFF492532),
    tertiaryContainer = Color(0xFF633B48),
    onTertiaryContainer = Color(0xFFFFD8E4),
    
    background = Color(0xFF1C1B1F),
    onBackground = Color(0xFFE6E1E5),
    surface = Color(0xFF1C1B1F),
    onSurface = Color(0xFFE6E1E5),
    
    surfaceContainerLow = Color(0xFF211F26),
    surfaceContainer = Color(0xFF252329),
    surfaceContainerHigh = Color(0xFF2B2930),
    surfaceContainerHighest = Color(0xFF36343B),
    
    error = Color(0xFFF2B8B5),
    onError = Color(0xFF601410),
    errorContainer = Color(0xFF8C1D18),
    onErrorContainer = Color(0xFFF9DEDC),
    
    outline = Color(0xFF938F99),
    outlineVariant = Color(0xFF49454F)
)
```

### 3.3 ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ ШЈЩҲ ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©

Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘЩ…ШұЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ `dynamicColor` Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§ШіШӘШҜШ№Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№ (Theme):

#### ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ© (Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠ):

```kotlin
WiFiAudioStreamingTheme(
    darkTheme = isSystemInDarkTheme(),
    dynamicColor = true  // ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©
) {
    // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ
}
```

#### ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©:

```kotlin
WiFiAudioStreamingTheme(
    darkTheme = isSystemInDarkTheme(),
    dynamicColor = false  // ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©
) {
    // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ
}
```

### 3.4 ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ©

Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮШҢ ЩҠЩ…ЩғЩҶ ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Type.kt:

#### ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ©:

```kotlin
val Typography = Typography(
    // Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠШ©
    bodyLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 16.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    
    // ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ© Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©
    displayLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 57.sp,
        lineHeight = 64.sp,
        letterSpacing = (-0.25).sp
    ),
    
    displayMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 45.sp,
        lineHeight = 52.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    
    displaySmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 36.sp,
        lineHeight = 44.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    
    headlineLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 32.sp,
        lineHeight = 40.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    
    headlineMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 28.sp,
        lineHeight = 36.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    
    headlineSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 24.sp,
        lineHeight = 32.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    
    titleLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 22.sp,
        lineHeight = 28.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.sp
    ),
    
    titleMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 16.sp,
        lineHeight = 24.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.15.sp
    ),
    
    titleSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 14.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.1.sp
    ),
    
    bodyMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 14.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.25.sp
    ),
    
    bodySmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
        fontSize = 12.sp,
        lineHeight = 16.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.4.sp
    ),
    
    labelLarge = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 14.sp,
        lineHeight = 20.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.1.sp
    ),
    
    labelMedium = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 12.sp,
        lineHeight = 16.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    ),
    
    labelSmall = TextStyle(
        fontFamily = FontFamily.Default,
        fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
        fontSize = 11.sp,
        lineHeight = 16.sp,
        letterSpacing = 0.5.sp
    )
)
```

### 3.5 ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ§ШӘ Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Typography

#### Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩ…Ш· Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ:

ЩҠШ¬ШЁ Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ ЩҶЩ…Ш· Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш· Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө ЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ЩҮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШіЩ„ШіЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҮШұЩ…ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШөШұЩҠ. ШҘЩ„ЩҠЩғ Ш§Щ„ШҘШұШҙШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ:

- **Headline Large/Medium/Small**: Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҙШ№Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ
- **Title Large/Medium/Small**: Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈЩӮШіШ§Щ…
- **Body Large/Medium/Small**: Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ
- **Label Large/Medium/Small**: Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШөШәЩҠШұШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©

#### Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… FontWeight ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШөШӯЩҠШӯ:

- **Bold**: Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ ШЁШұЩҲШІШ§ЩӢ
- **SemiBold**: Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш№ШЁШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ§ШұШІШ©
- **Medium**: Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©
- **Normal**: Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ…
- **Light**: Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠШ© ШЈЩҲ Ш§Щ„ШЈШұЩӮШ§Щ…

#### Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШЎШ©:

- Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШӘШЁШ§Ш№ШҜ ШЈШіШ·Шұ (lineHeight) Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ (1.5x ШҘЩ„Щү 2x Щ…ЩҶ ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·)
- Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ШӘШЁШ§Ш№ШҜ ШӯШұЩҲЩҒ (letterSpacing) Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ Щ„Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©
- Ш¶Щ…Ш§ЩҶ ШӘШЁШ§ЩҠЩҶ ЩғШ§ЩҒЩҚ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ©

### 3.6 Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Material 3 Expressive Features

ЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ШӘ Material 3 Expressive Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ ToggleButtonShapes ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұЩғЩҠШ©. ШҘЩ„ЩҠЩғ ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ШӘ:

#### Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ToggleButton Щ…Ш№ Shapes:

```kotlin
@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3ExpressiveApi::class)
@Composable
fun CustomModeSelector() {
    Row(
        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(ButtonGroupDefaults.ConnectedSpaceBetween)
    ) {
        ExpressiveModeButton(
            // Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШІШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲЩ„
            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
            shapes = ButtonGroupDefaults.connectedLeadingButtonShapes()
        )
        
        ExpressiveModeButton(
            // Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШІШұ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠ
            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f),
            shapes = ButtonGroupDefaults.connectedTrailingButtonShapes()
        )
    }
}
```

---

## Ш§Щ„ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ШЁШ№: ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©

### 4.1 Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ·

```kotlin
@Composable
fun CustomFeatureCard(
    title: String,
    description: String,
    icon: ImageVector,
    isActive: Boolean,
    onToggle: (Boolean) -> Unit
) {
    // ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
    val containerColor by animateColorAsState(
        targetValue = if (isActive) 
            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer 
        else 
            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh,
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        ),
        label = "Card Container Color"
    )
    
    ElevatedCard(
        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp),
        elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(
            defaultElevation = if (isActive) 8.dp else 4.dp
        ),
        colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(containerColor = containerColor)
    ) {
        Row(
            modifier = Modifier
                .fillMaxWidth()
                .padding(20.dp),
            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
        ) {
            // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…Ш№ ШӘШҜШұШ¬ Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠ
            Box(
                modifier = Modifier
                    .size(48.dp)
                    .clip(CircleShape)
                    .background(
                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.3f)
                    ),
                contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
            ) {
                Icon(
                    imageVector = if (isActive) icon else icon,
                    contentDescription = null,
                    modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
                )
            }
            
            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(16.dp))
            
            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
                // Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ©
                Text(
                    text = title,
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
                    fontWeight = if (isActive) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.SemiBold,
                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
                )
                
                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
                
                // ЩҲШөЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ©
                Text(
                    text = description,
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
                )
            }
            
            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
            
            // Щ…ЩҒШӘШ§Шӯ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„
            Switch(
                checked = isActive,
                onCheckedChange = onToggle,
                thumbContent = {
                    AnimatedContent(
                        targetState = isChecked,
                        transitionSpec = {
                            scaleIn() togetherWith scaleOut()
                        },
                        label = "Switch Thumb"
                    ) { checked ->
                        Icon(
                            imageVector = if (checked) Icons.Default.Check 
                                         else Icons.Default.Close,
                            contentDescription = null,
                            modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize)
                        )
                    }
                }
            )
        }
    }
}
```

### 4.2 Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө Theme Щ…Ш№ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©

```kotlin
// Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Щ…Ш®ШөШө: CustomTheme.kt

// ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©
object AppColors {
    // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш®Ш§ШөШ© ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ
    val StreamingGreen = Color(0xFF4CAF50)
    val ConnectionBlue = Color(0xFF2196F3)
    val ErrorRed = Color(0xFFF44336)
    
    // ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©
    fun streamingGradient(isDark: Boolean) = Brush.linearGradient(
        colors = if (isDark) {
            listOf(
                Color(0xFF4CAF50).copy(alpha = 0.8f),
                Color(0xFF2196F3).copy(alpha = 0.6f)
            )
        } else {
            listOf(
                Color(0xFF4CAF50),
                Color(0xFF2196F3)
            )
        }
    )
}

// ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¶ЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©
@Composable
fun AppCustomTheme(
    darkTheme: Boolean = isSystemInDarkTheme(),
    dynamicColor: Boolean = true,
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    val colorScheme = when {
        dynamicColor && Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.S -> {
            val context = LocalContext.current
            if (darkTheme) dynamicDarkColorScheme(context) 
            else dynamicLightColorScheme(context)
        }
        darkTheme -> DarkColorScheme
        else -> LightColorScheme
    }
    
    MaterialTheme(
        colorScheme = colorScheme,
        typography = Typography,
        content = content
    )
}
```

### 4.3 Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ©

```kotlin
@Composable
fun TextStylesShowcase() {
    Column(
        modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp),
        verticalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(12.dp)
    ) {
        //_headline styles
        Text(
            text = "Headline Large - Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Headline Medium - Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩӮШіШ§Щ…",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Headline Small - Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠШ©",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
        )
        
        HorizontalDivider(modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 8.dp))
        
        // Title styles
        Text(
            text = "Title Large - Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Title Medium - Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Title Small - ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
        )
        
        HorizontalDivider(modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 8.dp))
        
        // Body styles
        Text(
            text = "Body Large - ЩҶШө ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ ЩғШЁЩҠШұ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Body Medium - ЩҶШө Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ· Щ„Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§ШҜЩҠШ©",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Body Small - ЩҶШө ШөШәЩҠШұ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Normal,
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )
        
        HorizontalDivider(modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 8.dp))
        
        // Label styles
        Text(
            text = "Label Large - ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Label Medium - ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ ШӯЩӮЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium
        )
        
        Text(
            text = "Label Small - Ш№Щ„Ш§Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©",
            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
            fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
        )
    }
}
```

### 4.4 Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Gradients Щ…Ш№ Animation

```kotlin
@Composable
fun AnimatedGradientCard(
    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
) {
    val infiniteTransition = rememberInfiniteTransition(label = "Gradient")
    
    // ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Щ…ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬
    val gradientOffset by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
        initialValue = 0f,
        targetValue = 1f,
        animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
            animation = tween(3000, easing = LinearEasing),
            repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
        ),
        label = "Gradient Offset"
    )
    
    Card(
        modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
        shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp)
    ) {
        Box(
            modifier = Modifier
                .fillMaxWidth()
                .height(120.dp)
                .background(
                    brush = Brush.horizontalGradient(
                        colors = listOf(
                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer,
                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer,
                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
                        ),
                        startX = gradientOffset * 500,
                        endX = gradientOffset * 500 + 500
                    )
                ),
            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
        ) {
            Column(
                horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally
            ) {
                Text(
                    text = "Animated Gradient",
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
                )
                
                Text(
                    text = "Using Material 3 Colors",
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
                )
            }
        }
    }
}
```

---

## Ш§Щ„ЩӮШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§Щ…Ші: Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө ЩҲШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘ

### 5.1 Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ

ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming ШЈШіШ§ШіШ§ЩӢ Щ…ШӘЩҠЩҶШ§ЩӢ Щ„Щ„ШӘШөЩ…ЩҠЩ… ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Material 3 Expressive. ЩҠШӘШ¶Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШёШ§Щ…:

- **ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ©**: Primary (ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ) ЩҲ Secondary (Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠ) ЩҲ Tertiary (Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠ)
- **ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ**: Щ„ЩғЩ„ Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Щ…ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ Ш№Щ…ЩӮ ШЁШөШұЩҠ
- **ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШіШ·ШӯЩҠШ© Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ**: Щ…ЩҶ Surface Container Low ШҘЩ„Щү Surface Container Highest
- **ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©**: ШҜШ№Щ… ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„ЩҖ Dynamic Colors Ш№Щ„Щү Android 12+
- **ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©**: Щ„Щ„ШЈШ®Ш·Ш§ШЎ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШӯШ°ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ ЩҲЩҶШ¬Ш§Шӯ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘ

### 5.2 Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ·

ЩҠЩҲЩҒШұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Typography:

- **9 ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ЩҶШөЩҠШ©**: Щ…ЩҶ Display (Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш¶Ш®Щ…Ш©) ШҘЩ„Щү Label (Ш§Щ„ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ§ШӘ)
- **5 ШЈЩҲШІШ§ЩҶ Щ„Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ·**: Щ…ЩҶ Light ШҘЩ„Щү Bold
- **Ш®Ш· Roboto Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠ**: Щ…Ш№ ШҜШ№Щ… ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ·

### 5.3 ШӘЩҲШөЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ

1. **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… MaterialTheme.colorScheme**: Щ„Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШӯШҜ Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ
2. **ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠШ©**: Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш№Щ„Щү Android 12+
3. **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Typography Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ©**: Щ„Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШіШ§ЩӮ
4. **ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘШ©**: Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШҜШ§ШҰЩ…Ш§ЩӢ Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш·
5. **Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШұ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ЩҠЩҶ**: Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ Щ„Щ„ШӘШЈЩғШҜ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§ШЎШ©
6. **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШұШ¬Ш§ШӘ ШЁШ§Ш№ШӘШҜШ§Щ„**: Щ„ШӘШ№ШІЩҠШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© ШҜЩҲЩҶ ШҘЩҒШұШ§Ш·

### 5.4 Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҲШіШ№

Щ„ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№:

1. ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Color.kt Щ„ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©
2. ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ« Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Theme.kt Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ Щ…Ш®Ш·Ш·Ш§ШӘ ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ©
3. ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Type.kt ШЁШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ· ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ©
4. Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁШ© ЩҒЩҠ Theme Щ„Щ„Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜШ© Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ШӘ

---

## Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШ§Ш¬Ш№ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘ

- Щ…Щ„ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ: `app/src/main/java/com/cuscus/wifiaudiostreaming/ui/theme/Color.kt`
