```kotlin
        AnimatedContent(
            targetState = isChecked,
            transitionSpec = {
                scaleIn(animationSpec = spring()) togetherWith
                scaleOut(animationSpec = tween(100))
            }
        ) { checkedState ->
            Icon(
                imageVector = if (checkedState) Icons.Default.Check 
                              else Icons.Default.Close,
                contentDescription = null,
                modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize)
            )
        }
    }
)
```

### Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©

```kotlin
Switch(
    checked = isChecked,              // ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ (true/false)
    onCheckedChange = { isChecked -> // ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© ШӘЩҸШіШӘШҜШ№Щү Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ
        onCheckedChange(isChecked)
    },
    thumbContent = {                // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШЁШ¶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғ
        // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ШЈЩҲ ЩҶШө ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШЁШ¶
    },
    modifier = Modifier...,
    enabled = true,                 // ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„/ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„
    colors = SwitchDefaults.colors(
        checkedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
        checkedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer,
        uncheckedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
        uncheckedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
    )
)
```

### ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө

#### ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ
```kotlin
Switch(
    checked = checked,
    onCheckedChange = { checked = it },
    colors = SwitchDefaults.colors(
        // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҸЩҒШ№Щ‘Щ„Ш©
        checkedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
        checkedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
        checkedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
        
        // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Ш·Щ‘Щ„Ш©
        uncheckedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
        uncheckedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant,
        uncheckedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
        
        // ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„
        disabledCheckedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.38f),
        disabledCheckedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.12f),
        disabledUncheckedThumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.38f),
        disabledUncheckedTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface.copy(alpha = 0.12f)
    )
)
```

#### Switch Щ…Ш№ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ©
```kotlin
Switch(
    checked = isDarkMode,
    onCheckedChange = { isDarkMode = it },
    thumbContent = {
        AnimatedContent(
            targetState = isDarkMode,
            transitionSpec = {
                scaleIn(animationSpec = spring()) togetherWith
                fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(100))
            }
        ) { darkMode ->
            Icon(
                imageVector = if (darkMode) 
                    Icons.Default.DarkMode 
                else 
                    Icons.Default.LightMode,
                contentDescription = if (darkMode) "Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ§ЩғЩҶ" else "Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ§ШӘШӯ",
                modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize),
                tint = if (darkMode) 
                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary 
                else 
                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline
            )
        }
    }
)
```

---

## 5. Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШұШіЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ©

### 5.1 Scale Animations - ШӘШӯШ¬ЩҠЩ…

ШӘЩҸШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШҘШ№Ш·Ш§ШЎ ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩӮ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„.

```kotlin
// Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШ¬ЩҠЩ… Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ
val scale by animateFloatAsState(
    targetValue = if (isSelected) 1f else 0.95f,
    animationSpec = spring(
        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
    ),
    label = "Selection Scale"
)

Box(
    modifier = Modifier
        .graphicsLayer {
            scaleX = scale
            scaleY = scale
        }
)
```

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…Ш§ШӘ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ:**
- ExpressiveModeButton: ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШІШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШҜШҜ
- ExpressiveAudioSourceToggle: ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҒ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„
- Device Card: ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш№ЩҶШҜ ЩҲШ¬ЩҲШҜ ШЈШ¬ЩҮШІШ©

### 5.2 Slide Animations - Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„Ш§ЩӮ

```kotlin
// Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„Ш§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҒЩӮЩҠ
AnimatedVisibility(
    visible = isVisible,
    enter = slideInHorizontally(
        initialOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
        animationSpec = spring(
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium,
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioNoBouncy
        )
    ) + fadeIn(),
    exit = slideOutHorizontally(
        targetOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth }
    ) + fadeOut()
)
```

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- ШҙШ§ШҙШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ (Settings Screen): Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„Ш§ЩӮ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶ
- ExpressiveStreamingModeToggle: Ш§ЩҶШІЩ„Ш§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠ

### 5.3 Transitions - Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ

```kotlin
AnimatedContent(
    targetState = isStreaming,
    transitionSpec = {
        (fadeIn(animationSpec = spring()) +
         scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f, animationSpec = spring())
        ).togetherWith(
            fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(200)) +
            scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f, animationSpec = tween(200))
        )
    }
) { streaming ->
    if (streaming) {
        ActiveStreamingContent()
    } else {
        IdleContent()
    }
}
```

**Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш©:**
- `togetherWith`: ШҜЩ…Ш¬ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬
- `using`: ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Щ…ЩҲШ§ШөЩҒШ§ШӘ Ш§ЩҶШӘЩӮШ§Щ„ Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©

### 5.4 Infinite Animations - ШұШіЩҲЩ… Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ© Щ…ШіШӘЩ…ШұШ©

```kotlin
val infiniteTransition = rememberInfiniteTransition(label = "Pulse")

val pulse by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
    initialValue = 0.7f,
    targetValue = 1f,
    animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
        animation = tween(800),
        repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
    ),
    label = "Pulse Animation"
)

val wavyScale by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
    initialValue = 1f,
    targetValue = 1.4f,
    animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
        animation = tween(1000, easing = EaseInOutSine),
        repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
    ),
    label = "Wavy Scale"
)
```

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- ExpressiveStreamingActiveIndicator: ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШЁШ¶ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
- ExpressiveSearchingIndicator: ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШӯШ« Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ©

---

## 6. Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШөШ§ШӘ

### 6.1 ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Material 3

```kotlin
MaterialTheme.colorScheme.apply {
    primary          // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ
    onPrimary        // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©
    primaryContainer // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ
    onPrimaryContainer // ЩҶШө Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©
    
    secondary        // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠ
    tertiary         // Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§Щ„Ш«ЩҠ
    error            // Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ШЈ
    
    surface          // Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ
    surfaceVariant   // variant Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ
    surfaceContainer // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ
    background       // Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ©
    
    outline          // Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ
    outlineVariant   // variant Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ·Ш§Шұ
}
```

### 6.2 Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ (Shapes)

```kotlin
// Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§ЩҠШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШҜЩҠШұШ©
RoundedCornerShape(16.dp)   // Щ…ШіШӘШҜЩҠШұШ© ЩӮЩ„ЩҠЩ„Ш§ЩӢ
RoundedCornerShape(28.dp)   // Щ…ШіШӘШҜЩҠШұШ© Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§ (Expressive)
RoundedCornerShape(4.dp)    // ШӯШ§ШҜШ© ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШЁЩӢШ§

// ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©
CircleShape                 // ШҜШ§ШҰШұШ© ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©
RectangleShape              // Щ…ШіШӘШ·ЩҠЩ„

// ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ Щ…ШӘШөЩ„Ш© (Connected Shapes) - Material 3 Expressive
@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3ExpressiveApi::class)
ToggleButtonDefaults.shapes(
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(
        topStart = 28.dp,
        topEnd = 4.dp,
        bottomStart = 28.dp,
        bottomEnd = 4.dp
    )
)
```

### 6.3 Ш§Щ„ШЈШЁШ№Ш§ШҜ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ§ШӘ

**Ш§Щ„ШЈШӯШ¬Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠШ§ШіЩҠШ©:**
```kotlin
// Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ§ШӘ
8.dp   // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© ШөШәЩҠШұШ© (Spacer ШөШәЩҠШұ)
12.dp  // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·Ш©
16.dp  // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© ЩӮЩҠШ§ШіЩҠШ©
20.dp  // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©
24.dp  // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ© Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§
28.dp  // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© Expressive

// ШЈШӯШ¬Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ
20.dp  // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ШөШәЩҠШұШ©
24.dp  // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ЩӮЩҠШ§ШіЩҠШ©
28.dp  // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©
32.dp  // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Expressive
36.dp  // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ© Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§
48.dp  // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш¶Ш®Щ…Ш©

// ШЈШӯШ¬Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮЩҲЩ„
52.dp  // ШІШұ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ©
56.dp  // Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ ЩӮЩҠШ§ШіЩҠ
64.dp  // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© ЩғШЁЩҠШұШ©
72.dp  // ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© Expressive
```

### 6.4 Ш§Щ„ШёЩ„Ш§Щ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ (Elevation)

```kotlin
// ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…ШұШӘЩҒШ№Ш©
ElevatedCard(
    elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(
        defaultElevation = 4.dp,    // Ш§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҒШӘШұШ§Ш¶ЩҠ
        pressedElevation = 8.dp,     // Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШәШ·
        focusedElevation = 6.dp,     // Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШұЩғЩҠШІ
        hoveredElevation = 6.dp,    // Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұЩҲШұ (ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғШӘШЁ)
        draggedElevation = 12.dp     // Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШіШӯШЁ
    )
)

// ШұШіЩҲЩ… Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ© Щ„Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№
val cardElevation by animateFloatAsState(
    targetValue = if (isStreaming) 12f else 6f,
    animationSpec = spring(
        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
    ),
    label = "Card Elevation"
)
```

---

## 7. ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҠЩҮШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ

### 7.1 Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩғЩ„ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘШҹ

#### OutlinedTextField
вң… **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ ЩҶШө ШӯШұ (ШЈШіЩ…Ш§ШЎШҢ Ш№ЩҶШ§ЩҲЩҠЩҶШҢ ШЈШұЩӮШ§Щ…)
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ (Validation)
- ШӘШұЩҠШҜ Ш№ШұШ¶ ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩӮЩ„
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ„ЩҲШӯШ© Щ…ЩҒШ§ШӘЩҠШӯ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ© (ШЈШұЩӮШ§Щ…ШҢ ШЁШұЩҠШҜ ШҘЩ„ЩғШӘШұЩҲЩҶЩҠ...)

вқҢ **ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…ШӯШҜЩҲШҜШ© ШЁЩ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…Ш№ШұЩҲЩҒШ© (Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Dropdown)
- Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (true/false) (Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Switch)
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ Щ…ШіШӘЩ…Шұ (Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Slider)

#### ExposedDropdownMenuBox
вң… **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҠШ®ШӘШ§Шұ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ© Щ…ШіШЁЩӮЩӢШ§
- Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШЈЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶ 10
- ШӘШұЩҠШҜ ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ Щ…ШіШ§ШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҙШ©

вқҢ **ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ЩғШ«ЩҠШұШ© Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§ (ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ 15)
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү ШЁШӯШ« ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ

#### Slider
вң… **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© Ш¶Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠ Щ…ШіШӘЩ…Шұ
- ШӘШұЩҠШҜ ШҘШ№Ш·Ш§ШЎ ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ
- Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү "Ш¶ШЁШ·" Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш©

вқҢ **ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…ЩҶЩҒШөЩ„Ш© ЩҲШәЩҠШұ Щ…ШӘШөЩ„Ш©
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩӮШ© Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш¬ШҜЩӢШ§
- Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҠШ©

#### Switch
вң… **Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- Ш®ЩҠШ§Шұ Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠ (ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„/ШӘШ№Ш·ЩҠЩ„)
- Ш§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ ШӘШЈЩғЩҠШҜ
- ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ

вқҢ **ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁЩҮ Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұЩҠЩҶ
- ЩҠШӘШ·Щ„ШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈЩғЩҠШҜ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ

### 7.2 ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ§ШӘ

#### 1. ШұШҜЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіЩҠШ© (Haptic Feedback)
```kotlin
val haptic = LocalHapticFeedback.current

// Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„
Switch(
    checked = checked,
    onCheckedChange = {
        haptic.performHapticFeedback(
            if (it) HapticFeedbackType.ToggleOn 
            else HapticFeedbackType.ToggleOff
        )
        onCheckedChange(it)
    }
)

// Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш¶ШәШ· Ш№Щ„Щү ШІШұ
Button(
    onClick = {
        haptic.performHapticFeedback(HapticFeedbackType.LongPress)
        onClick()
    }
)
```

#### 2. ШҘШҜШ§ШұШ© ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШұЩғЩҠШІ
```kotlin
val focusManager = LocalFocusManager.current

OutlinedTextField(
    ...
    keyboardActions = KeyboardActions(
        onDone = { focusManager.clearFocus() },
        onNext = { focusManager.moveFocus(FocusDirection.Down) }
    )
)
```

#### 3. Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ (Validation)
```kotlin
OutlinedTextField(
    value = text,
    onValueChange = { newValue ->
        // Ш§Щ„ШіЩ…Ш§Шӯ ШЁШ§Щ„ШЈШұЩӮШ§Щ… ЩҒЩӮШ·
        if (newValue.all { it.isDigit() } && newValue.length <= 5) {
            text = newValue
        }
    },
    isError = text.isNotEmpty() && text.toIntOrNull() !in validRange,
    supportingText = {
        if (isError) {
            Text("ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© ШәЩҠШұ ШөШ§Щ„ШӯШ©")
        }
    }
)
```

#### 4. Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Colors Щ…ЩҶ Material Theme
```kotlin
// вқҢ ШӘШ¬ЩҶШЁ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘШ©
OutlinedTextField(
    colors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(
        focusedBorderColor = Color.Blue  // Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ
    )
)

// вң… Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Theme
OutlinedTextField(
    colors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(
        focusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
        unfocusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline
    )
)
```

#### 5. Responsive Design
```kotlin
OutlinedTextField(
    modifier = Modifier
        .fillMaxWidth()
        .padding(horizontal = 16.dp),
    ...
)
```

### 7.3 ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш©

#### ЩҶЩ…Ш· Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ (Settings Pattern)
```kotlin
@Composable
fun SettingsItem(
    title: String,
    description: String,
    icon: ImageVector,
    trailing: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    Row(
        modifier = Modifier
            .fillMaxWidth()
            .padding(horizontal = 20.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
    ) {
        Icon(
            imageVector = icon,
            contentDescription = null,
            modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp),
            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
        )
        Spacer(Modifier.width(20.dp))
        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
            Text(
                text = title,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
            )
            Text(
                text = description,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        trailing()
    }
}
```

#### ЩҶЩ…Ш· Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӘЩҒШ№Ш© (Elevated Card Pattern)
```kotlin
ElevatedCard(
    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp),
    colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh
    ),
    elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(defaultElevation = 8.dp)
) {
    Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)) {
        // Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү
    }
}
```

---

## 8. ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©

### 8.1 ШӯЩӮЩ„ ЩҶШөЩҠ Щ…ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„
```kotlin
@Composable
fun CustomTextField(
    value: String,
    onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
    label: String,
    placeholder: String = "",
    leadingIcon: ImageVector? = null,
    isError: Boolean = false,
    errorMessage: String = "",
    keyboardType: KeyboardType = KeyboardType.Text,
    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
) {
    val focusManager = LocalFocusManager.current
    
    Column(modifier = modifier) {
        OutlinedTextField(
            value = value,
            onValueChange = onValueChange,
            label = { Text(label) },
            placeholder = { Text(placeholder) },
            leadingIcon = leadingIcon?.let { 
                { Icon(it, contentDescription = null) }
            },
            trailingIcon = if (value.isNotEmpty()) {
                {
                    IconButton(onClick = { onValueChange("") }) {
                        Icon(Icons.Default.Clear, contentDescription = "Щ…ШіШӯ")
                    }
                }
            } else null,
            isError = isError,
            supportingText = if (isError) {
                { Text(errorMessage) }
            } else null,
            keyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions(
                keyboardType = keyboardType,
                imeAction = ImeAction.Done
            ),
            keyboardActions = KeyboardActions(
                onDone = { focusManager.clearFocus() }
            ),
            singleLine = true,
            shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
            colors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(
                focusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
                unfocusedBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline,
                errorBorderColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error,
                focusedContainerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh,
                unfocusedContainerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
            )
        )
    }
}
```

### 8.2 ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Щ…ЩҶШіШҜЩ„Ш© Щ…ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©
```kotlin
@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
@Composable
fun <T> CustomDropdownMenu(
    label: String,
    options: List<Pair<String, T>>,
    selectedOption: T,
    onOptionSelected: (T) -> Unit,
    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
) {
    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    val selectedLabel = options.find { it.second == selectedOption }?.first ?: ""
    
    ExposedDropdownMenuBox(
        expanded = expanded,
        onExpandedChange = { expanded = it },
        modifier = modifier
    ) {
        OutlinedTextField(
            value = selectedLabel,
            onValueChange = {},
            label = { Text(label) },
            readOnly = true,
            trailingIcon = { 
                ExposedDropdownMenuDefaults.TrailingIcon(expanded = expanded)
            },
            modifier = Modifier
                .menuAnchor()
                .fillMaxWidth(),
            shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
            colors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(
                focusedContainerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh,
                unfocusedContainerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
            )
        )
        
        ExposedDropdownMenu(
            expanded = expanded,
            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false },
            modifier = Modifier.background(MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh)
        ) {
            options.forEach { (label, value) ->
                DropdownMenuItem(
                    text = { Text(label) },
                    onClick = {
                        onOptionSelected(value)
                        expanded = false
                    },
                    leadingIcon = if (value == selectedOption) {
                        {
                            Icon(
                                Icons.Default.Check,
                                contentDescription = null,
                                tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
                            )
                        }
                    } else null
                )
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### 8.3 ШҙШұЩҠШ· ШӘЩ…ШұЩҠШұ Щ…ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„
```kotlin
@Composable
fun CustomSlider(
    value: Float,
    onValueChange: (Float) -> Unit,
    valueRange: ClosedFloatingPointRange<Float> = 0f..100f,
    steps: Int = 0,
    title: String = "",
    valueFormatter: (Float) -> String = { it.toInt().toString() },
    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
) {
    Column(modifier = modifier) {
        if (title.isNotEmpty()) {
            Row(
                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween
            ) {
                Text(
                    text = title,
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge
                )
                Text(
                    text = valueFormatter(value),
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
                )
            }
            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
        }
        
        Slider(
            value = value,
            onValueChange = onValueChange,
            valueRange = valueRange,
            steps = steps,
            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
            colors = SliderDefaults.colors(
                thumbColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
                activeTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
                inactiveTrackColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
            )
        )
    }
}
```

### 8.4 Щ…ЩҒШӘШ§Шӯ ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ Щ…ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„
```kotlin
@Composable
fun CustomSwitchItem(
    title: String,
    description: String,
    checkedIcon: ImageVector,
    uncheckedIcon: ImageVector,
    checked: Boolean,
    onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit,
    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
) {
    val haptic = LocalHapticFeedback.current
    
    // ШұШіЩҲЩ… Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ©
    val scale by animateFloatAsState(
        targetValue = if (checked) 1.02f else 1f,
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        )
    )
    
    val backgroundColor by animateColorAsState(
        targetValue = if (checked) 
            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.3f)
        else 
            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainer,
        animationSpec = spring()
    )
    
    Row(
        modifier = modifier
            .fillMaxWidth()
            .clip(RoundedCornerShape(28.dp))
            .background(backgroundColor)
            .padding(16.dp)
            .scale(scale),
        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
    ) {
        // ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ©
        AnimatedContent(
            targetState = checked,
            transitionSpec = {
                scaleIn(animationSpec = spring()) togetherWith scaleOut()
            }
        ) { isChecked ->
            Icon(
                imageVector = if (isChecked) checkedIcon else uncheckedIcon,
                contentDescription = null,
                modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp),
                tint = if (isChecked) 
                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary 
                else 
                    MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        
        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(16.dp))
        
        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
            Text(
                text = title,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
                fontWeight = if (checked) FontWeight.Bold else FontWeight.Medium
            )
            Text(
                text = description,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
            )
        }
        
        Switch(
            checked = checked,
            onCheckedChange = {
                haptic.performHapticFeedback(
                    if (it) HapticFeedbackType.ToggleOn 
                    else HapticFeedbackType.ToggleOff
                )
                onCheckedChange(it)
            },
            thumbContent = {
                AnimatedContent(
                    targetState = checked,
                    transitionSpec = {
                        scaleIn(animationSpec = spring()) togetherWith 
                        scaleOut(animationSpec = tween(100))
                    }
                ) { isChecked ->
                    Icon(
                        imageVector = if (isChecked) 
                            Icons.Default.Check 
                        else 
                            Icons.Default.Close,
                        contentDescription = null,
                        modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize)
                    )
                }
            }
        )
    }
}
```

---

## 9. Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШ№Ш©

### Ш¬ШҜЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ШұЩҶШ©

| Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶ | Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„ | Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠШІШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© | Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¶Ш№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҒ |
|--------|------------------|------------------|-----------------|
| **OutlinedTextField** | ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ ЩҶШө/ШЈШұЩӮШ§Щ… ШӯШұШ© | Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШөШӯШ©ШҢ Щ„ЩҲШӯШ© Щ…ЩҒШ§ШӘЩҠШӯ Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©ШҢ ШӘШіЩ…ЩҠШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҠШ© | 253, 651 |
| **ExposedDropdownMenuBox** | Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ЩҶ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ© | ШӯЩҒШё Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШӯШ©ШҢ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ© Щ…ШіШЁЩӮЩӢШ§ | 917 |
| **Slider** | ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠ Щ…ШіШӘЩ…Шұ | ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ ШЁШ§Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұШҢ Ш¶ШЁШ· ШҜЩӮЩҠЩӮ | 1007, 1736 |
| **Switch** | Ш®ЩҠШ§Шұ Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠ ON/OFF | ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠШҢ ШұШҜЩҲШҜ ЩҒШ№Щ„ Щ„Щ…ШіЩҠШ© | 878, 1544, 1634 |

### ШЈЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Modifiers Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш©

```kotlin
.fillMaxWidth()                    // Щ…Щ„ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШ¶
.padding(16.dp)                    // Щ…ШіШ§ЩҒШ© ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ЩҠШ©
.clip(RoundedCornerShape(28.dp))  // ЩӮШө Ш§Щ„ШІЩҲШ§ЩҠШ§
.background(color)                // Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ©
.clickable { }                     // ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮШұ
.scale(value)                      // ШӘШӯШ¬ЩҠЩ…
.graphicsLayer { }                 // Ш·ШЁЩӮШ§ШӘ ШұШіЩҲЩ…ЩҠШ©
.menuAnchor()                      // ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© Ш§ШұШӘЩғШ§ШІ Щ„Щ„ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш©
```

### ШЈЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Animations Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш©

```kotlin
animateFloatAsState()              // ШӘШӯШ¬ЩҠЩ…ШҢ ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ
animateColorAsState()              // ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ
AnimatedVisibility()               // ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ
AnimatedContent()                  // ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү
rememberInfiniteTransition()       // ШұШіЩҲЩ… Щ…ШіШӘЩ…ШұШ© (loops)
spring()                           // ЩҒЩҠШІЩҠШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШұШЁШ·
```

---

## 10. Ш®Ш§ШӘЩ…Ш©

ЩҠЩӮШҜЩ… Material 3 Expressive Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© ЩӮЩҲЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӘШ¬Щ…Ш№ ШЁЩҠЩҶ:
- **Ш§Щ„ЩҲШёШ§ШҰЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ©**: ЩғЩ„ Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶ ЩҠШӨШҜЩҠ ЩҲШёЩҠЩҒШ© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ© ШЁЩҲШ¶ЩҲШӯ
- **Ш§Щ„ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШө Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩҠЩӮ**: ШҘЩ…ЩғШ§ЩҶЩҠШ© ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶШҢ Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ШҢ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„ЩҲЩғ
- **Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©**: ШҜШ№Щ… ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„ШұШіЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғШ© ЩҲШұШҜЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіЩҠШ©
- **Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШіШ§ЩӮ**: ШӘШЁШ№ЩӢШ§ Щ„ЩҶШёШ§Щ… Material Design Щ„Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘЩҶШ§ШіЩӮ ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…

**Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөШ§ШҰШӯ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠШ©:**
1. Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШҜШ§ШҰЩ…ЩӢШ§ `MaterialTheme.colorScheme` Щ„Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ
2. ШЈШ¶ЩҒ `HapticFeedback` Щ„ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…
3. Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `AnimatedVisibility` Щ„ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШЁШіЩ„Ш§ШіШ©
4. Ш§Ш¬Ш№Щ„ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ Responsive ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… `fillMaxWidth()`
5. Ш·ШЁЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ Щ…ЩҶ ШөШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ®Щ„Ш§ШӘ ШҜШ§ШҰЩ…ЩӢШ§
6. Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ (Shapes) Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҶШ§ШіЩӮШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ

---

**ШӘЩ… ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Щ„ЩҒ:**
`/media/youusef/ProgramS/Div/Github/WiFiAudioStreaming-Android/app/src/main/java/com/cuscus/wifiaudiostreaming/Composables.kt`

**ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ® Ш§Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ:** 2025-03-02


---
## File: docs/analysis_animations.md

# ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„ЩҖ Animations ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҖ Transformations
## ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Android ШЁШ§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… Jetpack Compose Щ…Ш№ Material 3 Expressive

---

## Щ…ЩӮШҜЩ…Ш©

ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ„ЩҒ ЩҠШӯЩ„Щ„ Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animations ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҖ transformations ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Щ„ЩҒ `Composables.kt` Ш¶Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming. Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ…ЩғШӘШЁШ© Jetpack Compose Щ…Ш№ Material 3 Expressive Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШіЩ„ШіШ© ЩҲШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©.

---

## 1. ШЈЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Animations

### 1.1 animateColorAsState

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШіЩ„Ші ШЁЩҠЩҶ ЩӮЩҠЩ… Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ©.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 128-136**: Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ ШӘШӘШәЩҠШұ Щ„ЩҲЩҶЩҮШ§ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ streaming
  ```kotlin
  val backgroundGradient by animateColorAsState(
      targetValue = if (isStreaming) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer.copy(alpha = 0.1f)
      else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
      ),
      label = "Background Gradient"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1068-1080**: Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШӯШ§ЩҲЩҠШ© TopAppBar ЩҠШӘШәЩҠШұ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШөШ§Щ„
  ```kotlin
  val containerColor by animateColorAsState(
      targetValue = when {
          isStreaming -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
          connectionState.isConnected -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer
          connectionState.isError -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
          else -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
      },
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
      ),
      label = "TopAppBar Container Color"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1082-1091**: Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӨШҙШұ (Indicator) ЩҠШӘШәЩҠШұ ШӯШіШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
  ```kotlin
  val indicatorColor by animateColorAsState(
      targetValue = when {
          isStreaming -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
          connectionState.isConnected -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiary
          connectionState.isError -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
          connectionState.isWaiting -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
          else -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outline
      },
      label = "Indicator Color"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1674-1683**: Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… ЩҠШӘШәЩҠШұ ШЈШ«ЩҶШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ streaming
  ```kotlin
  val cardColor by animateColorAsState(
      targetValue = if (isStreaming)
          MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
      else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
      ),
      label = "Control Center Card Color"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 2031-2039**: ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Mode Tag
  ```kotlin
  val backgroundColor by animateColorAsState(
      targetValue = if (isMulticast) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer 
      else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer,
      animationSpec = spring(),
      label = "TagBackgroundColor"
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„ШӘШ®ШөЩҠШөШ§ШӘ:**
- `Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy`: ЩҠШ№Ш·ЩҠ Ш§ШұШӘШҜШ§ШҜ Ш®ЩҒЩҠЩҒ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҲЩ„ Щ„Щ„ЩҮШҜЩҒ
- `Spring.StiffnessVeryLow`: ЩҠШ¬Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұЩғШ© ШЁШ·ЩҠШҰШ© ЩҲЩҶШ§Ш№Щ…Ш©
- `Spring.DampingRatioNoBouncy`: ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш§ШұШӘШҜШ§ШҜ (linear)

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… animateColorAsStateШҹ**
- Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШұЩҠШҜ ШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„ ЩҶШ§Ш№Щ… ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ
- ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
- ШҘШ№Ш·Ш§ШЎ feedback ШЁШөШұЩҠ Ш№ЩҶШҜ ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©

---

### 1.2 animateFloatAsState

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш№ШҜШҜЩҠШ© (Float) Щ…Ш«Щ„ scale, rotation, elevation.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 680-687**: ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§ЩғШӘШҙШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ¬ЩҮШІШ©
  ```kotlin
  val cardElevation by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (devices.isNotEmpty()) 12f else 6f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Discovery Panel Elevation"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 704-711**: scale Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШұШЈШі Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ©
  ```kotlin
  val headerIconScale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (devices.isNotEmpty()) 1.1f else 1f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Discovery Header Icon Scale"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 729-736**: ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ ШІШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ«
  ```kotlin
  val refreshRotation by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (devices.isEmpty()) 360f else 0f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Refresh Button Rotation"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1125-1132**: scale Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ streaming
  ```kotlin
  val titleScale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (isStreaming) 1.05f else 1f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Title Scale"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1164-1171**: scale ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
  ```kotlin
  val iconScale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (connectionState.isError || connectionState.isWaiting) 1.1f else 1f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Status Icon Scale"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1214-1221**: elevation Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ©
  ```kotlin
  val cardElevation by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (enabled) 8f else 4f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Card Elevation"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1236-1243**: ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш№ЩҶШҜ ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№
  ```kotlin
  val headerIconRotation by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (isServer) 180f else 0f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Header Icon Rotation"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1308-1315**: scale ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№
  ```kotlin
  val scale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (isSelected) 1f else 0.95f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Mode Button Scale"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1482-1489**: scale ШөЩҒ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
  ```kotlin
  val rowScale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (checked) 1.02f else 1f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Streaming Mode Row Scale"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1577-1584**: scale ШөЩҒ Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҲШӘ
  ```kotlin
  val rowScale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (checked) 1.02f else 1f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Audio Source Row Scale"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1685-1692**: elevation ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ…
  ```kotlin
  val cardElevation by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (isStreaming) 12f else 6f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Control Center Card Elevation"
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1856-1863**: scale Ш¬Ш§ЩҮШІЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШҜЩ…
  ```kotlin
  val readyScale by animateFloatAsState(
      targetValue = if (isReady) 1f else 0.8f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      ),
      label = "Server Ready Scale"
  )
  ```

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… animateFloatAsStateШҹ**
- ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ (scale)
- ШӘШҜЩҲЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ (rotation)
- ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШёЩ„/Ш§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ (elevation)
- ШЈЩҠ ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© Ш№ШҜШҜЩҠШ© ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ ШіЩ„Ші

---

### 1.3 AnimatedContent

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ші ШЁЩҠЩҶ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© Щ…Ш№ animations Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 1141-1159**: ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠ (Subtitle) ЩҒЩҠ TopAppBar
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = subtitle,
      transitionSpec = {
          (slideInVertically { height -> height } + fadeIn(
              animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy)
          )).togetherWith(
              slideOutVertically { height -> -height } + fadeOut()
          )
      },
      label = "Subtitle Animation"
  ) { status ->
      Text(
          text = status,
          style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
          color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
          fontWeight = if (isStreaming) FontWeight.Medium else FontWeight.Normal,
          modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 2.dp)
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1338-1359**: ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ШІШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = isSelected,
      transitionSpec = {
          scaleIn(
              animationSpec = spring(
                  dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
                  stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
              )
          ).togetherWith(
              scaleOut(
                  animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
              )
          )
      },
      label = "Mode Icon Animation"
  ) { selected ->
      Icon(
          imageVector = if (selected) selectedIcon else icon,
          contentDescription = null,
          modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1503-1518**: ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = checked,
      transitionSpec = {
          scaleIn(
              animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy)
          ).togetherWith(scaleOut())
      },
      label = "Streaming Mode Icon Animation"
  ) { isChecked ->
      Icon(
          imageVector = if (isChecked) checkedIcon else icon,
          contentDescription = null,
          modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp),
          tint = if (isChecked) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1528-1541**: ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұШ№ЩҠ Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = subtitle,
      transitionSpec = {
          (slideInVertically { height -> height / 2 } + fadeIn())
              .togetherWith(slideOutVertically { height -> -height / 2 } + fadeOut())
      },
      label = "Streaming Mode Subtitle"
  ) { text ->
      Text(
          text = text,
          style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
          color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1551-1561**: ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Switch Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = checked,
      label = "Switch Thumb Icon"
  ) { isChecked ->
      Icon(
          imageVector = if (isChecked) Icons.Default.Groups else Icons.Default.Person,
          contentDescription = null,
          modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize)
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1598-1617**: ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҲШӘ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = checked,
      transitionSpec = {
          scaleIn(
              animationSpec = spring(
                  dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
                  stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
              )
          ).togetherWith(scaleOut())
      },
      label = "Audio Source Icon Animation"
  ) { isChecked ->
      Icon(
          imageVector = if (isChecked) checkedIcon else icon,
          contentDescription = null,
          modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp),
          tint = if (isChecked) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
          else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1643-1657**: ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Switch Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҲШӘ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = checked,
      transitionSpec = {
          scaleIn(animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = 0.6f, stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow)) togetherWith
                  scaleOut(animationSpec = tween(100))
      },
      label = "SwitchThumbIcon"
  ) { isChecked ->
      Icon(
          imageVector = if (isChecked) Icons.Default.Check else Icons.Default.Close,
          contentDescription = null,
          modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize),
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1700-1756**: ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ…
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = isStreaming,
      transitionSpec = {
          (fadeIn(animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy)) +
                  scaleIn(
                      initialScale = 0.8f,
                      animationSpec = spring(
                          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
                          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
                      )
                  )).togetherWith(
              fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(200)) +
                      scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f, animationSpec = tween(200))
          )
      },
      modifier = Modifier
          .fillMaxWidth()
          .padding(28.dp),
      contentAlignment = Alignment.Center,
      label = "Streaming Control Animation"
  ) { streaming ->
      if (streaming) {
          Column(horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally) {
              ExpressiveStreamingActiveIndicator(onStopServer = onStopServer)
              // ...
          }
      } else if (isServer) {
          ExpressiveServerControls(...)
      } else {
          ExpressiveClientIdleIndicator()
      }
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1936-1953**: ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ШІШұ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШЎ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = isReady,
      transitionSpec = {
          scaleIn(
              animationSpec = spring(
                  dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
                  stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
              )
          ).togetherWith(scaleOut())
      },
      label = "Start Button Icon Animation"
  ) { ready ->
      Icon(
          imageVector = if (ready) Icons.Default.PlayArrow else Icons.Default.Info,
          contentDescription = null,
          modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
      )
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 2479-2491**: ШӘШӯШұЩҠЩғ ЩҶШө Ш§Щ„ШІШұ ЩҒЩҠ Onboarding
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedContent(
      targetState = pagerState.currentPage == pagerState.pageCount - 1,
      transitionSpec = {
          fadeIn(animationSpec = spring()) togetherWith fadeOut(animationSpec = spring())
      },
      label = "Button Text Animation"
  ) { isLastPage ->
      if (isLastPage) {
          Text(stringResource(id = R.string.start))
      } else {
          Text(stringResource(id = R.string.next))
      }
  }
  ```

**Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… `togetherWith`:**
- `togetherWith` ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШҜЩ…Ш¬ animation Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ Щ…Ш№ animation Ш§Щ„Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬
- Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„: `slideIn() + fadeIn() togetherWith slideOut() + fadeOut()`

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… AnimatedContentШҹ**
- Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ Щ…Ш®ШӘЩ„ЩҒШ© ШЁЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§ШӯШ©
- ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
- ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҶШөЩҲШө ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғ

---

### 1.4 AnimatedVisibility

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ ЩҲШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Щ…Ш№ animations Щ…Ш®ШөШөШ©.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 172-194**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШҜЩ…
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(
      visible = isServer && !isStreaming,
      enter = expandVertically(
          animationSpec = spring(
              dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
              stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
          )
      ) + fadeIn() + scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f),
      exit = shrinkVertically(
          animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
      ) + fadeOut() + scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f)
  ) {
      ExpressiveAudioSourceSelector(...)
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 197-214**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩҠЩ„
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(
      visible = !isServer && !isStreaming && appSettings.experimentalFeaturesEnabled,
      enter = expandVertically(
          animationSpec = spring(
              dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
              stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
          )
      ) + fadeIn() + scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f),
      exit = shrinkVertically(
          animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
      ) + fadeOut() + scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f)
  ) {
      ExpressiveClientSettingsPanel(...)
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 227-238**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ¬ЩҮШІШ©
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(
      visible = !isServer && !isStreaming,
      enter = expandVertically(
          animationSpec = spring(
              dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
              stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
          )
      ) + fadeIn() + scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f),
      exit = shrinkVertically(
          animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
      ) + fadeOut() + scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f)
  ) {
      // Content
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 381-405**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ ШҙШ§ШҙШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(
      visible = isVisible,
      enter = slideInHorizontally(
          initialOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
          animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium, dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioNoBouncy)
      ) + fadeIn(),
      exit = slideOutHorizontally(
          targetOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
          animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
      ) + fadeOut()
  ) {
      SettingsScreenContent(...)
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 494-502**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш®ЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҒЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(visible = appSettings.experimentalFeaturesEnabled) {
      SettingsSwitchItem(...)
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 568-578**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ ШӯЩӮЩ„ Щ…ЩҶЩҒШ° Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҒЩҲЩҶ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(visible = appSettings.experimentalFeaturesEnabled) {
      SettingsTextFieldItem(...)
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1430-1439**: ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш®ЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҠЩғШұЩҲЩҒЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¬ШұЩҠШЁЩҠ
  ```kotlin
  AnimatedVisibility(visible = experimentalFeaturesEnabled) {
      ExpressiveAudioSourceToggle(...)
  }
  ```

**Animations Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш©:**
- **Enter**: `expandVertically() + fadeIn() + scaleIn()`
- **Exit**: `shrinkVertically() + fadeOut() + scaleOut()`
- **Slide**: `slideInHorizontally() + slideOutHorizontally()`

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… AnimatedVisibilityШҹ**
- ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮШ©
- ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ ЩӮЩҲШ§ШҰЩ… ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„Ш·ЩҠ
- ШӘШӯЩ…ЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШӘШҜШұЩҠШ¬ЩҠ

---

### 1.5 InfiniteTransition

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ animations Щ„Ш§ ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (continuous) Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШЁШ¶Ш§ШӘ (pulses) ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬Ш§ШӘ (waves).

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 1767-1802**: Щ…ШӨШҙШұ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ« Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ· Щ…Ш№ ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶШЁШ¶
  ```kotlin
  val infiniteTransition = rememberInfiniteTransition(label = "Streaming Active")
  
  val wavyScale by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
      initialValue = 1f,
      targetValue = 1.4f,
      animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
          animation = tween(1000, easing = EaseInOutSine),
          repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
      ),
      label = "Wavy Scale"
  )

  val pulse by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
      initialValue = 0.7f,
      targetValue = 1f,
      animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
          animation = tween(800),
          repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
      ),
      label = "Streaming Pulse"
  )
  
  // Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:
  Box(
      modifier = Modifier
          .size(72.dp)
          .scale(wavyScale)
          .graphicsLayer { alpha = pulse }
  ) {
      Icon(...)
  }
  ```

**Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө `infiniteRepeatable`:**
- `animation`: ШӘШӯШҜШҜ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animation (tween)
- `repeatMode`: 
  - `RepeatMode.Reverse`: ЩҠШұШ¬Ш№ Щ„Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘЩҮШ§ШЎ (Ping-Pong)
  - `RepeatMode.Restart`: ЩҠШЁШҜШЈ Щ…ЩҶ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ
- `tween`: animation Ш®Ш·ЩҠШ© Щ…Ш№ Щ…ШҜШ© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©
- `EaseInOutSine`: easing ЩҶШ§Ш№Щ… ЩҠШЁШҜШЈ ЩҲЩҠЩҶШӘЩҮЩҠ ШЁШЁШ·ШЎ

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… InfiniteTransitionШҹ**
- Щ…ШӨШҙШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ…ЩҠЩ„ (Loading indicators)
- ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШЁШ¶ (Pulse effects)
- Animations Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩ…ШұШ©
- ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ "breathing"

---

## 2. ШЈЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Transitions

### 2.1 scaleIn / scaleOut

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ/ШӘШөШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШёЩҮЩҲШұ/Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҒШ§ШЎ.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 179**: scaleIn Щ…Ш№ initialScale
  ```kotlin
  enter = ... + scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f),
  exit = ... + scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f)
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1704-1709**: scaleIn ЩҒЩҠ AnimatedContent
  ```kotlin
  scaleIn(
      initialScale = 0.8f,
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      )
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1712**: scaleOut Щ…Ш№ targetScale
  ```kotlin
  scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f, animationSpec = tween(200))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1339-1349**: scaleIn/scaleOut ЩҒЩҠ Mode Button
  ```kotlin
  scaleIn(
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      )
  ).togetherWith(
      scaleOut(animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium))
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- `initialScale`: Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„Ш§ШЁШӘШҜШ§ШҰЩҠ (0.8f = 80%)
- `targetScale`: Ш§Щ„ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠ
- `animationSpec`: ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animation (spring, tween)

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… scaleIn/scaleOutШҹ**
- Ш№ЩҶШҜ ШёЩҮЩҲШұ Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ©
- ШӘШЈЩғЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„Ш§ШӘ (micro-interactions)
- ШҘШ№Ш·Ш§ШЎ ШҘШӯШіШ§Ші ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩӮ

---

### 2.2 slideIn / slideOut

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„/ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮ Щ…Ш№ЩҠЩҶ.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 383-390**: slideInHorizontally / slideOutHorizontally
  ```kotlin
  enter = slideInHorizontally(
      initialOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
      animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium, dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioNoBouncy)
  ) + fadeIn(),
  exit = slideOutHorizontally(
      targetOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
      animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
  ) + fadeOut()
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1144-1148**: slideInVertically / slideOutVertically
  ```kotlin
  (slideInVertically { height -> height } + fadeIn()).togetherWith(
      slideOutVertically { height -> -height } + fadeOut()
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1531-1532**: slideInVertically Щ…Ш№ offset
  ```kotlin
  (slideInVertically { height -> height / 2 } + fadeIn())
      .togetherWith(slideOutVertically { height -> -height / 2 } + fadeOut())
  ```

**Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ©:**
- `slideInHorizontally`: ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶ/Ш§Щ„ЩҠШіШ§Шұ
- `slideOutHorizontally`: ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ Щ„Щ„ЩҠЩ…ЩҠЩҶ/Ш§Щ„ЩҠШіШ§Шұ
- `slideInVertically`: ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ№Щ„Щү/Ш§Щ„ШЈШіЩҒЩ„
- `slideOutVertically`: ШҘШ®ШұШ§Ш¬ Щ„Щ„ШЈШ№Щ„Щү/Ш§Щ„ШЈШіЩҒЩ„

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- `initialOffsetX`: ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© ШӘЩҸШ№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҘШІШ§ШӯШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШЁШӘШҜШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (Щ…ЩҶ -width ШҘЩ„Щү +width)
- `targetOffsetX`: ШҜШ§Щ„Ш© ШӘЩҸШ№ЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ШҘШІШ§ШӯШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠШ©
- lambda parameter ЩҠЩҸШ№Ш·ЩҠ fullWidth/fullHeight

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… slideIn/slideOutШҹ**
- Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶЩӮЩ„ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҙШ§ШӘ (Navigation)
- ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҲШ§ШҰЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш¬Ш§ЩҶШЁЩҠШ©
- ШҘШҜШ®Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШҘШҙШ№Ш§ШұШ§ШӘ

---

### 2.3 fadeIn / fadeOut

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШЁШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҒШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© (opacity).

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 172-182**: fadeIn/fadeOut Щ…Ш№ expand/shrink
  ```kotlin
  enter = expandVertically(...) + fadeIn() + scaleIn(...),
  exit = shrinkVertically(...) + fadeOut() + scaleOut(...)
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 386**: fadeIn ЩҒЩҠ ШҙШ§ШҙШ© Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜШ§ШӘ
  ```kotlin
  enter = slideInHorizontally(...) + fadeIn()
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 758-767**: fadeIn/fadeOut Щ…Ш№ expand/shrink ЩҒЩҠ Device Discovery
  ```kotlin
  (fadeIn(animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy)) +
      expandVertically(...)
  ).togetherWith(
      fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(200)) +
          shrinkVertically(animationSpec = tween(200))
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1144**: fadeIn Щ…Ш№ spring
  ```kotlin
  fadeIn(animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1703-1712**: fadeIn/fadeOut ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШұЩғШІ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ…
  ```kotlin
  (fadeIn(animationSpec = spring(dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy)) + ...).togetherWith(
      fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(200)) + ...
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- `animationSpec`: ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animation
- `initialAlpha`: Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҒШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШЁШӘШҜШ§ШҰЩҠШ©
- `targetAlpha`: Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҒШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠШ©

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… fadeIn/fadeOutШҹ**
- ШӘЩҶШ№ЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШёЩҮЩҲШұ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҒШ§ШЎ
- Ш№ШҜЩ… Ш¬Ш°ШЁ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩҶШӘШЁШ§ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШІШ§ШҰШҜ
- ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒШ© layers Щ„Щ„ЩҖ animations Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ШұЩү

---

### 2.4 expandVertically / shrinkVertically

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№/ШӘЩӮЩ„ЩҠШө Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш№Щ…ЩҲШҜЩҠШ§ЩӢ Щ…Ш№ ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 174-178**: expandVertically
  ```kotlin
  enter = expandVertically(
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      )
  ) + fadeIn() + scaleIn(initialScale = 0.8f)
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 180-182**: shrinkVertically
  ```kotlin
  exit = shrinkVertically(
      animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
  ) + fadeOut() + scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f)
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 759-763**: expandVertically ЩҒЩҠ Device Discovery
  ```kotlin
  expandVertically(
      animationSpec = spring(
          dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
          stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
      )
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 766**: shrinkVertically Щ…Ш№ tween
  ```kotlin
  shrinkVertically(animationSpec = tween(200))
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- `animationSpec`: ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animation
- `expandFrom`: Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШЁШҜШЈ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ (Top, Bottom, Center)
- `shrinkTowards`: ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩҠЩҶ ЩҠШӘЩӮЩ„Шө

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… expand/shrinkШҹ**
- ЩӮЩҲШ§ШҰЩ… Accordion
- ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ ШҘШ¶Ш§ЩҒЩҠШ©
- Forms Щ…ШӘШ№ШҜШҜШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ§ШӘ

---

### 2.5 togetherWith

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШҜЩ…Ш¬ animation Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„ Щ…Ш№ animation Ш§Щ„Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬ ЩҒЩҠ AnimatedContent.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 764-767**: ШҜЩ…Ш¬ fade + expand/shrink
  ```kotlin
  (fadeIn(...) + expandVertically(...)).togetherWith(
      fadeOut(...) + shrinkVertically(...)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1146**: ШҜЩ…Ш¬ slide + fade
  ```kotlin
  (slideInVertically { height -> height } + fadeIn()).togetherWith(
      slideOutVertically { height -> -height } + fadeOut()
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1346**: ШҜЩ…Ш¬ scaleIn Щ…Ш№ scaleOut
  ```kotlin
  scaleIn(...).togetherWith(scaleOut(...))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1710**: ШҜЩ…Ш¬ fadeIn + scaleIn Щ…Ш№ fadeOut + scaleOut
  ```kotlin
  (fadeIn(...) + scaleIn(...)).togetherWith(
      fadeOut(...) + scaleOut(...)
  )
  ```

**ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:**
```kotlin
AnimatedContent(
    targetState = state,
    transitionSpec = {
        enterAnimation.togetherWith(exitAnimation)
    }
) { currentState ->
    // Content
}
```

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… togetherWithШҹ**
- ЩҒЩҠ AnimatedContent ШҜШ§ШҰЩ…Ш§ЩӢ
- Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШҜ ЩғЩҠЩҒ ЩҠШҜШ®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜ ЩҲЩҠШ®ШұШ¬ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШҜЩҠЩ…
- Щ„ШҘЩҶШҙШ§ШЎ transitions ШіЩ„ШіШ© ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш§ШӘ

---

## 3. ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Animation Specs

### 3.1 Spring Animation

**Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ:** Animation Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠ ЩҠШӯШ§ЩғЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӯШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҠШІЩҠШ§ШҰЩҠШ© (Щ…Ш«Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ§ШЁШ¶).

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 131-134**: Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ
  ```kotlin
  animationSpec = spring(
      dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
      stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 175-178**: Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШҜЩ…
  ```kotlin
  spring(
      dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
      stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1075-1078**: TopAppBar
  ```kotlin
  spring(
      dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
      stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**

#### dampingRatio (Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ®Щ…ЩҠШҜ)
- `Spring.DampingRatioNoBouncy` (1.0f): ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ Ш§ШұШӘШҜШ§ШҜ
- `Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy` (0.75f): Ш§ШұШӘШҜШ§ШҜ Ш®ЩҒЩҠЩҒ
- `Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy` (0.5f): Ш§ШұШӘШҜШ§ШҜ Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·
- `Spring.DampingRatioHighBouncy` (0.2f): Ш§ШұШӘШҜШ§ШҜ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠ

#### stiffness (Ш§Щ„ШөЩ„Ш§ШЁШ©)
- `Spring.StiffnessHigh` (10_000f): ШіШұЩҠШ№ Ш¬ШҜШ§ЩӢ
- `Spring.StiffnessMedium` (1500f): Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ·
- `Spring.StiffnessLow` (300f): ШЁШ·ЩҠШЎ
- `Spring.StiffnessVeryLow` (50f): ШЁШ·ЩҠШЎ Ш¬ШҜШ§ЩӢ

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… SpringШҹ**
- Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ЩҠШ©
- ШЈШІШұШ§ШұШҢ switchesШҢ toggles
- ШЈЩҠ animation ЩҠШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ "feel" ЩҒЩҠШІЩҠШ§ШҰЩҠ

---

### 3.2 Tween Animation

**Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ:** Animation ШЁЩ…ШҜШ© Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘШ© Щ…Ш№ curve Щ…ШӯШҜШҜ (easing).

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 1772**: Wavy Scale ЩҒЩҠ Streaming Active
  ```kotlin
  animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
      animation = tween(1000, easing = EaseInOutSine),
      repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1782**: Pulse Animation
  ```kotlin
  animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
      animation = tween(800),
      repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 765**: fadeOut ЩҒЩҠ Device Discovery
  ```kotlin
  fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(200))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 766**: shrinkVertically
  ```kotlin
  shrinkVertically(animationSpec = tween(200))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1711**: fadeOut ЩҒЩҠ Control Center
  ```kotlin
  fadeOut(animationSpec = tween(200))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1712**: scaleOut Щ…Ш№ tween
  ```kotlin
  scaleOut(targetScale = 0.8f, animationSpec = tween(200))
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1647**: scaleOut ШіШұЩҠШ№
  ```kotlin
  scaleOut(animationSpec = tween(100))
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- `durationMillis`: Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…Щ„Щ„ЩҠ Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҠШ© (1000ms = 1s)
- `easing`: ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ curve
  - `LinearEasing`: Ш®Ш·ЩҠ Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ
  - `FastOutSlowInEasing`: ШіШұЩҠШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШЁШ·ЩҠШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ЩҠШ©
  - `EaseInOutSine`: ЩҶШ§Ш№Щ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ЩҠШ©
  - `EaseOut`: ШЁШ·ЩҠШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ©ШҢ ШіШұЩҠШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ЩҠШ©

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… TweenШҹ**
- Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§ ЩҶШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ Щ…ШҜШ© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©
- Animations Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩғШұШұШ© (infinite)
- Ш§Щ„ЩҖ easing Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®ШөШө

---

### 3.3 infiniteRepeatable

**Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШұЩҠЩҒ:** ШӘЩғШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animation ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ Щ„Ш§ ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠ.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 1771-1775**: Wavy Scale
  ```kotlin
  animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
      animation = tween(1000, easing = EaseInOutSine),
      repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1781-1785**: Pulse Animation
  ```kotlin
  animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
      animation = tween(800),
      repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№Щ„Щ…Ш§ШӘ:**
- `animation`: Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animation Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠ (tween, spring)
- `repeatMode`: 
  - `RepeatMode.Reverse`: ЩҠШ№ЩғШі Ш§Щ„Ш§ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮ (Ping-Pong)
  - `RepeatMode.Restart`: ЩҠШ№ЩҠШҜ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҜШ§ЩҠШ©

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… infiniteRepeatableШҹ**
- Щ…ШӨШҙШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ…ЩҠЩ„
- ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩ…Шұ
- Animations Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ©

---

## 4. ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ Transformations

### 4.1 graphicsLayer

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ ШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ©/Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШЁШ№Ш§ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 743**: ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ ШІШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШҜЩҠШ«
  ```kotlin
  FilledTonalIconButton(
      onClick = { ... },
      modifier = Modifier.graphicsLayer { rotationZ = refreshRotation }
  ) {
      Icon(...)
  }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1120-1138**: scale Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ
  ```kotlin
  val titleScale by animateFloatAsState(...)
  
  Text(
      text = title,
      modifier = Modifier.scale(titleScale)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1249-1250**: ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№
  ```kotlin
  Icon(
      imageVector = Icons.Default.SwapHoriz,
      modifier = Modifier
          .size(28.dp)
          .graphicsLayer { rotationZ = headerIconRotation }
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1327-1330**: scale ШЈШІШұШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№
  ```kotlin
  ToggleButton(
      modifier = modifier.graphicsLayer {
          scaleX = scale
          scaleY = scale
      }
  ) { ... }
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1800-1801**: alpha ЩҒЩҠ Streaming Active
  ```kotlin
  Box(
      modifier = Modifier
          .scale(wavyScale)
          .graphicsLayer { alpha = pulse }
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§ШӯШ©:**
- `rotationZ`: Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ Z (2D)
- `rotationX`: Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ X (3D)
- `rotationY`: Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ ШӯЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ Y (3D)
- `scaleX`: Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ X
- `scaleY`: Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ Y
- `alpha`: Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҒШ§ЩҒЩҠШ© (0f - 1f)
- `translationX`: Ш§Щ„ШҘШІШ§ШӯШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ X
- `translationY`: Ш§Щ„ШҘШІШ§ШӯШ© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯЩҲШұ Y

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… graphicsLayerШҹ**
- ШҜЩҲШұШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ
- ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ 3D
- ШӘШӯШіЩҠЩҶ ШЈШҜШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animations (compositing)

---

### 4.2 scale Modifier

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ/ШӘШөШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ ШЁШіЩҮЩҲЩ„Ш©.

**Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ§ЩӮШ№ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ:**
- **ШіШ·Шұ 718**: scale Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© ЩҒЩҠ Device Discovery
  ```kotlin
  Icon(
      modifier = Modifier
          .size(28.dp)
          .scale(headerIconScale)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1138**: scale Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ
  ```kotlin
  Text(
      modifier = Modifier.scale(titleScale)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1184**: scale ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
  ```kotlin
  Box(
      modifier = Modifier
          .scale(iconScale)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1500**: scale ШөЩҒ ЩҲШ¶Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
  ```kotlin
  Row(
      modifier = Modifier.scale(rowScale)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1595**: scale ШөЩҒ Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҲШӘ
  ```kotlin
  Row(
      modifier = Modifier.scale(rowScale)
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1800**: scale ЩҒЩҠ Streaming Active
  ```kotlin
  Box(
      modifier = Modifier
          .scale(wavyScale)
          .graphicsLayer { alpha = pulse }
  )
  ```

- **ШіШ·Шұ 1880**: scale Ш¬Ш§ЩҮШІЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШҜЩ…
  ```kotlin
  Box(
      modifier = Modifier.scale(readyScale)
  )
  ```

**Ш§Щ„ЩҒШұЩӮ ШЁЩҠЩҶ `scale` Modifier ЩҲ `graphicsLayer { scaleX/Y }`:**
- `scale` Modifier: ШЈШЁШіШ·ШҢ ЩҠШ·ШЁЩӮ ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш№Щ„Щү X ЩҲ Y
- `graphicsLayer`: ЩҠШӘЩҠШӯ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶЩҒШөЩ„ ЩҒЩҠ scaleX ЩҲ scaleY + Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө ШЈШ®ШұЩү

**Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… scaleШҹ**
- ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„
- ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ "press"
- ШӘЩҶШЁЩҠЩҮШ§ШӘ ШЁШөШұЩҠШ©

---

## 5. ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҠЩҮШ§ШӘ Щ„Щ„Щ…Ш·ЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ

### 5.1 Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩғЩ„ ЩҶЩҲШ№ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ AnimationsШҹ

| ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Animation | Щ…ШӘЩү ЩҶШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҮ | Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ |
|-------------------|-------------|------|
| `animateColorAsState` | ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ | Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ§ШӘШҢ Щ…ШӨШҙШұШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© |
| `animateFloatAsState` | ЩӮЩҠЩ… Ш№ШҜШҜЩҠШ© | scale, rotation, elevation |
| `AnimatedContent` | ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ | ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘШҢ ЩҶШөЩҲШө |
| `AnimatedVisibility` | ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ | ЩӮЩҲШ§ШҰЩ…ШҢ ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ |
| `InfiniteTransition` | effects Щ…ШіШӘЩ…ШұШ© | loading, pulse |

### 5.2 ЩғЩҠЩҒЩҠШ© Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Animation Spec Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ

**Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Spring Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- ШӘШұЩҠШҜ ШӯШұЩғШ© Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШ©
- Щ„Ш§ ШӘЩҮШӘЩ… ШЁШ§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„ШІЩ…ЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩӮЩҠЩӮШ©
- ШӘШұЩҠШҜ "feel" ЩҒЩҠШІЩҠШ§ШҰЩҠ (buttons, switches)

**Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Tween Ш№ЩҶШҜЩ…Ш§:**
- ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ Щ…ШҜШ© Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ©
- ШӘШұЩҠШҜ control ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ timing
- ШӘШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… infiniteRepeatable

**Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Easing Щ…ЩҶШ§ШіШЁ:**
- `LinearEasing`: Щ„Щ„ШЈШҙЩғШ§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҮЩҶШҜШіЩҠШ©
- `FastOutSlowInEasing`: Щ„Щ„ШёЩҮЩҲШұ
- `EaseOut`: Щ„Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҒШ§ШЎ
- `EaseInOutSine`: Щ„Щ„ШӯШұЩғШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩғШұШұШ©

### 5.3 ШЈЩҒШ¶Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…Ш§ШұШіШ§ШӘ Щ„ЩҖ Material 3 Expressive

1. **consistency**: Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҶЩҒШі Ш§Щ„ЩҖ specs ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩғЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘШҙШ§ШЁЩҮШ©
2. **labels**: Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `label` parameter Щ„Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animations Щ„ШӘШіЩҮЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ debugging
3. **performance**: Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `graphicsLayer` Щ„Щ„ЩҖ animations Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш№ЩӮШҜШ©
4. **haptics**: ШЈШ¶ЩҒ Haptic Feedback Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animations Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш©
5. **timing**: 
   - ШіШұЩҠШ№ (100-200ms): micro-interactions
   - Щ…ШӘЩҲШіШ· (300-500ms): transitions
   - ШЁШ·ЩҠШЎ (800-1000ms): effects Ш®Ш§ШөШ©

### 5.4 ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҶЩ…Ш§Ш· Ш§Щ„ШҙШ§ШҰШ№Ш©

#### Pattern 1: Button Press Effect
```kotlin
val scale by animateFloatAsState(
    targetValue = if (isPressed) 0.95f else 1f,
    animationSpec = spring(
        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
    )
)

Button(
    modifier = Modifier.scale(scale)
) { ... }
```

#### Pattern 2: Card Expansion
```kotlin
AnimatedVisibility(
    visible = isExpanded,
    enter = expandVertically(
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        )
    ) + fadeIn(),
    exit = shrinkVertically(
        animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
    ) + fadeOut()
) {
    // Expanded content
}
```

#### Pattern 3: Screen Transition
```kotlin
AnimatedVisibility(
    visible = isVisible,
    enter = slideInHorizontally(
        initialOffsetX = { it },
        animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
    ) + fadeIn(),
    exit = slideOutHorizontally(
        targetOffsetX = { it },
        animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
    ) + fadeOut()
) {
    // Screen content
}
```

#### Pattern 4: Icon Toggle
```kotlin
AnimatedContent(
    targetState = isChecked,
    transitionSpec = {
        scaleIn(
            animationSpec = spring(
                dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
                stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
            )
        ).togetherWith(
            scaleOut(animationSpec = tween(100))
        )
    }
) { checked ->
    Icon(
        imageVector = if (checked) Icons.Default.Check else Icons.Default.Close
    )
}
```

#### Pattern 5: Pulse Effect
```kotlin
val infiniteTransition = rememberInfiniteTransition(label = "Pulse")
val scale by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
    initialValue = 1f,
    targetValue = 1.2f,
    animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
        animation = tween(600, easing = EaseInOutSine),
        repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
    )
)

Box(modifier = Modifier.scale(scale))
```

---

## 6. ШЈЩ…Ш«Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©

### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 1: Top App Bar Щ…Ш№ Animations Щ…ШӘЩғШ§Щ…Щ„Ш©
```kotlin
@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
@Composable
fun AnimatedTopAppBar(
    title: String,
    isStreaming: Boolean,
    connectionState: ConnectionState
) {
    // ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШЁЩҶШ§ШЎЩӢ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
    val containerColor by animateColorAsState(
        targetValue = when {
            isStreaming -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
            connectionState.isConnected -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.tertiaryContainer
            connectionState.isError -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer
            else -> MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
        },
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioLowBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessVeryLow
        ),
        label = "Container Color"
    )
    
    // ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш№ЩҶШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ«
    val titleScale by animateFloatAsState(
        targetValue = if (isStreaming) 1.05f else 1f,
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        ),
        label = "Title Scale"
    )
    
    // ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ ШЈЩҠЩӮЩҲЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§Щ„Ш©
    val iconScale by animateFloatAsState(
        targetValue = if (connectionState.isError) 1.1f else 1f,
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        ),
        label = "Icon Scale"
    )

    LargeTopAppBar(
        title = {
            Column {
                Text(
                    text = title,
                    modifier = Modifier.scale(titleScale),
                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium
                )
                
                // ЩҶШө Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғ
                AnimatedContent(
                    targetState = connectionState,
                    transitionSpec = {
                        slideInVertically { it } + fadeIn() togetherWith
                        slideOutVertically { -it } + fadeOut()
                    }
                ) { state ->
                    Text(
                        text = when {
                            state.isConnected -> "Connected"
                            state.isError -> "Error"
                            else -> "Disconnected"
                        }
                    )
                }
            }
        },
        actions = {
            Box(modifier = Modifier.scale(iconScale)) {
                StatusIcon(connectionState)
            }
        },
        colors = TopAppBarDefaults.largeTopAppBarColors(
            containerColor = containerColor
        )
    )
}
```

### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 2: Switch Щ…Ш№ AnimatedContent
```kotlin
@Composable
fun AnimatedSwitch(
    checked: Boolean,
    onCheckedChange: (Boolean) -> Unit
) {
    Switch(
        checked = checked,
        onCheckedChange = onCheckedChange,
        thumbContent = {
            AnimatedContent(
                targetState = checked,
                transitionSpec = {
                    scaleIn(
                        animationSpec = spring(
                            dampingRatio = 0.6f,
                            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
                        )
                    ) togetherWith scaleOut(
                        animationSpec = tween(100)
                    )
                },
                label = "SwitchThumb"
            ) { isChecked ->
                Icon(
                    imageVector = if (isChecked) 
                        Icons.Default.Check 
                    else 
                        Icons.Default.Close,
                    contentDescription = null,
                    modifier = Modifier.size(SwitchDefaults.IconSize)
                )
            }
        }
    )
}
```

### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 3: Щ…ШӨШҙШұ ЩҶШҙШ· Щ…Ш№ InfiniteTransition
```kotlin
@Composable
fun ActiveStreamingIndicator() {
    val infiniteTransition = rememberInfiniteTransition(
        label = "Streaming"
    )
    
    // ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҲШ¬Ш©
    val wavyScale by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
        initialValue = 1f,
        targetValue = 1.4f,
        animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
            animation = tween(1000, easing = EaseInOutSine),
            repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
        ),
        label = "Wavy"
    )
    
    // ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШЁШ¶
    val pulse by infiniteTransition.animateFloat(
        initialValue = 0.7f,
        targetValue = 1f,
        animationSpec = infiniteRepeatable(
            animation = tween(800),
            repeatMode = RepeatMode.Reverse
        ),
        label = "Pulse"
    )
    
    Box(
        modifier = Modifier
            .size(72.dp)
            .scale(wavyScale)
            .graphicsLayer { alpha = pulse },
        contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
    ) {
        Icon(
            imageVector = Icons.Default.RadioButtonChecked,
            contentDescription = "Streaming",
            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
        )
    }
}
```

### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 4: ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© ЩӮШ§ШЁЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№
```kotlin
@Composable
fun ExpandableCard(
    title: String,
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    var isExpanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    
    val cardElevation by animateFloatAsState(
        targetValue = if (isExpanded) 12f else 4f,
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        ),
        label = "Card Elevation"
    )
    
    ElevatedCard(
        elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(
            defaultElevation = cardElevation.dp
        ),
        onClick = { isExpanded = !isExpanded }
    ) {
        Column {
            Text(
                text = title,
                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge
            )
            
            AnimatedVisibility(
                visible = isExpanded,
                enter = expandVertically(
                    animationSpec = spring(
                        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
                        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
                    )
                ) + fadeIn() + scaleIn(initialScale = 0.95f),
                exit = shrinkVertically(
                    animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
                ) + fadeOut() + scaleOut(targetScale = 0.95f)
            ) {
                content()
            }
        }
    }
}
```

### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 5: ШІШұ ШҜЩҲШ§Шұ
```kotlin
@Composable
fun RotatingButton(
    onClick: () -> Unit,
    isRefreshing: Boolean
) {
    val rotation by animateFloatAsState(
        targetValue = if (isRefreshing) 360f else 0f,
        animationSpec = spring(
            dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
            stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
        ),
        label = "Rotation"
    )
    
    IconButton(
        onClick = onClick,
        modifier = Modifier.graphicsLayer { rotationZ = rotation }
    ) {
        Icon(
            imageVector = Icons.Default.Refresh,
            contentDescription = "Refresh"
        )
    }
}
```

### Щ…Ш«Ш§Щ„ 6: ШҙШ§ШҙШ© ШҜШ®ЩҲЩ„/Ш®ШұЩҲШ¬
```kotlin
@Composable
fun SlidingScreen(
    isVisible: Boolean,
    content: @Composable () -> Unit
) {
    AnimatedVisibility(
        visible = isVisible,
        enter = slideInHorizontally(
            initialOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
            animationSpec = spring(
                stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium,
                dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioNoBouncy
            )
        ) + fadeIn(
            animationSpec = tween(300)
        ),
        exit = slideOutHorizontally(
            targetOffsetX = { fullWidth -> fullWidth },
            animationSpec = spring(stiffness = Spring.StiffnessMedium)
        ) + fadeOut(
            animationSpec = tween(200)
        )
    ) {
        content()
    }
}
```

---

## Щ…Щ„Ш®Шө

ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ Щ…Ш¬Щ…ЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ШӘЩҶЩҲШ№Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ Animations ЩҲШ§Щ„ЩҖ Transformations Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШәЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҲШіЩ„ШіШ©:

1. ** animateColorAsState**: Щ„ШӘШәЩҠЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ ШЁШҙЩғЩ„ ШіЩ„Ші
2. ** animateFloatAsState**: Щ„Щ„ЩҖ scale, rotation, elevation
3. ** AnimatedContent**: Щ„Щ„ШӘШЁШҜЩҠЩ„ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩҠШ§ШӘ
4. ** AnimatedVisibility**: Щ„ШҘШёЩҮШ§Шұ/ШҘШ®ЩҒШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш№ЩҶШ§ШөШұ
5. ** InfiniteTransition**: Щ„Щ„ЩҖ effects Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩ…ШұШ©
6. ** graphicsLayer**: Щ„Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш«ЩҶШ§ШҰЩҠШ©/Ш«Щ„Ш§Ш«ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈШЁШ№Ш§ШҜ
7. ** scale Modifier**: Щ„Щ„ШӘЩғШЁЩҠШұ/Ш§Щ„ШӘШөШәЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШіШұЩҠШ№

**ЩҶШөШ§ШҰШӯ Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©:**
- Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `spring` Щ„Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ШЁЩҠШ№ЩҠШ©
- Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `tween` Щ„Щ„ШӘШӯЩғЩ… Ш§Щ„ШҜЩӮЩҠЩӮ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ©
- Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `togetherWith` Щ„ШҜЩ…Ш¬ animations
- Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… `label` ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ…ЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩҖ animations
- Ш§Ш¬Щ…Ш№ ШЁЩҠЩҶ `fadeIn/Out` Щ…Ш№ animations ШЈШ®ШұЩү Щ„ШӘЩҶШ№ЩҠЩ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШЈШ«ЩҠШұ


---
## File: docs/analysis_cards.md

# ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШҙШ§Щ…Щ„ Щ„Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ WiFi Audio Streaming

## ЩҶШёШұШ© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш©
ЩҠШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ **Jetpack Compose** Щ…Ш№ **Material 3 Expressive** Щ„ШӘЩҲЩҒЩҠШұ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ШӯШҜЩҠШ«Ш© ЩҲШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ©. ЩҠЩӮШҜЩ… ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШҙШұШӯШ§ЩӢ ШӘЩҒШөЩҠЩ„ЩҠШ§ЩӢ Щ„ШЈЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ЩғЩҲЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЁШөШұЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш©.

---

## 1. ШӘШӯЩ„ЩҠЩ„ ШЈЩҶЩҲШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ§ШӘ (Cards)

### 1.1 ElevatedCard

`ElevatedCard` ЩҮЩҲ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ… ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ. ЩҠШӘЩ…ЩҠШІ ШЁШ§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ ЩҲШ§Ш¶Шӯ ЩҲШёЩ„ Щ…ШұШҰЩҠ ЩҠШ№Ш·ЩҠ ШҙШ№ЩҲШұШ§ЩӢ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№Щ…ЩӮ.

#### Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ©:

| Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөЩҠШ© | Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҒ |
|---------|-------|
| `modifier` | Щ„ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„ ШӯШ¬Щ… ЩҲЩ…ЩҲЩӮШ№ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© |
| `shape` | ШҙЩғЩ„ ШӯЩҲШ§ЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© |
| `colors` | ШЈЩ„ЩҲШ§ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© (Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ„ЩҒЩҠШ© ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү) |
| `elevation` | Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШёЩ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ |
| `onClick` | ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© (Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§ШұЩҠ) |

---

### 1.2 Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ… ElevatedCard ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ·ШЁЩҠЩӮ

#### ШЈ) ExpressiveModeSelector (Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шұ 1223-1290)

```kotlin
ElevatedCard(
    modifier = modifier,
    elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(defaultElevation = cardElevation.dp),
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp),
    colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainer
    )
) {
    Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(24.dp)) {
        // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ©
    }
}
```

**Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш©:**

| Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөЩҠШ© | Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© | Ш§Щ„ЩҲШөЩҒ |
|---------|--------|-------|
| `elevation` | `cardElevation.dp` (4-8 dp Щ…ШӘШәЩҠШұШ©) | Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Щ…ШӘШӯШұЩғ ЩҠШӘШәЩҠШұ ШӯШіШЁ ШӯШ§Щ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ№ЩҠЩ„ |
| `shape` | `RoundedCornerShape(28.dp)` | ШІЩҲШ§ЩҠШ§ ШҜШ§ШҰШұЩҠШ© ШЁЩҶШөЩҒ 28dp |
| `containerColor` | `surfaceContainer` | Щ„ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шӯ Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ЩҶЩҲЩҠ |

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩҲШ¶Ш№ (Server/Client) - ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ЩҠШ© ШЁШҜЩҲЩҶ onClick Щ…ШЁШ§ШҙШұ.

---

#### ШЁ) ExpressiveAudioSourceSelector (Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шұ 1392-1467)

```kotlin
ElevatedCard(
    modifier = modifier,
    elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(defaultElevation = 8.dp),
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp),
    colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh
    )
) {
    Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)) {
        // Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҲШӘ
    }
}
```

**Ш§Щ„Ш®ШөШ§ШҰШө:**

| Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш§ШөЩҠШ© | Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© | Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӯШёШ© |
|---------|--------|--------|
| `elevation` | `8.dp` Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ | Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҚ Щ„ШҘШЁШұШ§ШІ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҮЩ…ЩҠШ© |
| `containerColor` | `surfaceContainerHigh` | Щ„ЩҲЩҶ ШЈЩҒШӘШӯ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШіШ§ШЁЩӮ |

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіШӘШ®ШҜШ§Щ…:** ШЁШ·Ш§ЩӮШ© Ш§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ШөШҜШұ Ш§Щ„ШөЩҲШӘ (Internal Audio / Microphone) Щ…Ш№ Ш®ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ Multicast.

---

#### Ш¬) ExpressiveDeviceDiscoveryPanel (Ш§Щ„ШіШ·Шұ 689-778)

```kotlin
ElevatedCard(
    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    shape = RoundedCornerShape(28.dp),
    elevation = CardDefaults.elevatedCardElevation(defaultElevation = cardElevation.dp),
    colors = CardDefaults.elevatedCardColors(
        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceContainerHigh
    )
) {
    Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(24.dp)) {
        // ЩӮШ§ШҰЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШ¬ЩҮШІШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩғШӘШҙЩҒШ©
    }
}
```

**Ш§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҠЩҶШ§Щ…ЩҠЩғЩҠ:**
```kotlin
val cardElevation by animateFloatAsState(
    targetValue = if (devices.isNotEmpty()) 12f else 6f,
    animationSpec = spring(
        dampingRatio = Spring.DampingRatioMediumBouncy,
        stiffness = Spring.StiffnessLow
    ),
    label = "Discovery Panel Elevation"
)
```
